6wnN9Tx.name: Bat'karé à Buzet
6wnN9Tx.description:
Nice highline, easy to acces (5min) and to rig.
We found it while climbing in the sector, but the spot is quite obvious when you walk down the path.
We rigged it after riding about 400km from Venise ! We were travelling as light as possible, that is why we did not have very thick slings and protections for the anchor.

UWlwYGx.name: Unidos Somos Mais Fortes - United we´re stronger
UWlwYGx.description:
The Utiariti Falls, which is located on the Parrot River, marks the border between two indigenous communities of different ethnicities. On the left side, for those looking at the waterfall from the front, live the Parecis and on the right, the Nambikwara. Today they live in harmony, but in the past they fought for control of these lands.
From this story came the idea of ​​a line that would join the two ends of the waterfall and thus become a bridge for crossings, a symbol of unity between the two peoples.
A line that would appear where it previously seemed impossible to walk on foot and that walking would be a message that crosses and exchanges knowledge.
The line was built and the crossing completed, thus giving it the name "united we are stronger" as a dream of a future of mutual collaboration and friendship between people,
UWlwYGx.restriction: partial: You will need to be authorized by the native people who own this land, the indigenous parecis

GgAEXZm.name: DO NOT RIG THIS LINE - Read below
GgAEXZm.description:
Access is open, but sensitive at this location. No new bolts are to be placed, but most highlines can be rigged. Be sure to evaluate the integrity of the bolts before rigging. Please read the information below. 

Kjerag is a pristine natural gem with 1000m high fjords and glacier lakes. It is a very popular tourist attraction, due to the fjords and the curiosity of Kjeragbolten, a large boulder jammed between two cliff faces. (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kjeragbolten)

Highline have been in this area since 2010 when it was opened by a group of French highliners who placed 4 lines (~20m, 22m, 23m, and 55m) in the area around the bolt (http://highlinedatabase.blogspot.com/search?q=norway) between 2010-2012. Since then, a few more lines have been added and this site is one of the most striking and well known highline areas in the world with vertical exposures of 1000m sheer drops. 

Bolting or any other permanent change to the natural landscape is illegal in Norway without express permission of the landowner or land managers and they take this very seriously. 

The first lines were bolted without permission, as the "ask forgiveness not permission" approach was more common at that time. However, in 2016, the local tourism, climbing, and conservation organizations became aware of highline bolts being placed without permission. A line was placed by Czech slackliners across the large gap in front of Kjeragbolton. With 3000 people a day hiking to the site to take a photo, this drew too much attention. 

The local organizations initially considered banning highlining in the area. The International Slackline Association worked with these organizations to maintain access in the area. 

Currently, no new lines are to be bolted at this site. The current bolts can still be used, with the exception of the bolts placed for the line behind Kjeragbolton (marked on this map for clarity but noted as off limits). 

Additionally, the ISA has had reports of rust on the bolts of the 23m line, BASEline, which was made famous in the film, I Believe I Can Fly. Be very cautious using these bolts. If anyone is motivated to replace them, please contact the ISA at info@slacklineinternational.org for more information. 

Please see the ISA post: 
http://www.slacklineinternational.org/2016/11/update-bolting-and-highlining-in-norway/

_V_6amt.name: Tree Hugger
_V_6amt.description: A great, short line that's begging to be rigged on tight nylon! You'll want some pulleys for this line because you'll need a good bit of tension to keep the line off the edge as the anchor tree on the west side is 20ft from the edge. In addition, the line runs quite close to a side wall so a tight line will keep you and your friends from hitting during a wild whip. Also, beware of the no fall zone next to a tree which leans off the rim to within 4ft off the line. This tree is the inspiration for the line's name: "tree hugger".

Cf9NLvS.name: Gertrude’s Cooperative Crew (GCC)
Cf9NLvS.description:
An amazing line, very exposed not only by its height but also side exposure, on both side. From the line you can see the village and even the sea ! It’s also a quite, wild place. A lot of shadow in the canyon, can be cold in the winter. Quite a difficult access and rigging, you should go there for a few days in a row and with a good team :)

Open by : Moritz Wohlauf, Laetitia Gonnon, Maurice Ammann, in February 2016

If you like an adventure and you don't mind you take up the gear this is a beautiful 75m line with an exposure to lake Garda and beyond. there is tons more potential on Monte Casale. 9lonm4O.description:
People from Coimbra were desperate for a Highline close enough and with fast and good access so we can train daily. So we found this spot that after some team work in cleaning everything and cutting trees we made it possible.
There is no fall zones in the first 5-10m of one side because or a big orange tree under the line that we didnt manage to cut yet.
This line is not free to rigg by everybody, Only together with the slackline coimbra team since its above a private terrain on a little village. So if u want to rigg the line or enjoy it u must speak with Daniel Couto from the Coimbra Slackline Team.
9lonm4O.restriction: partial: The only restriction is the fact that is above a private terrain that only the slackline Coimbra Team has permission for it. Talk with Daniel Couto

ue6Dg0e.name: Ishikiri Mountain highline 90m
ue6Dg0e.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @slackaholix

k65YEOK.name: Babilônia Line
k65YEOK.description: You need cleaning tools to access the trees, the woods are closed and you are in the middle of the trail that climbs to reach the top of the waterfall, at the look of the to elaborate the access, there are several trees with various types of options.

MlGPMPg.name: Little Fiji
MlGPMPg.description: park Car near Large boulder on road, access same as The Boneyard climbing area.

QEjp-1g.name: Bird Man Gap
QEjp-1g.description:
A beautliful 75m gap parallel with China Man Gap.
Great opportunity to rig two parallel freestyle highlines with one of the best views on the mountain!
FA by Alejandro Sanchez and James Xu

s7FPKT-.name: Cul qui roule n'amasse pas mousse

HlnASF1.description: Las mejores vistas de todo el Salto,

z0hq6Al.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

MtRfajt.name: Vodítko
MtRfajt.description: Thick beech left from the Gastonka crag on the one side, few pine trees on the other side. 15 minutes walk from the parking lot

CXsMCY7.name: Ruine Reußenstein
CXsMCY7.description: Relative low line. It's nice to have main-backup connections like b-loops.

YcDyydz.description: Contact @grab.slacklines for more info!. Big boulder and tree

VTXu3VQ.name: Victoria Bridge, 69 and the Eroticats
VTXu3VQ.description:
Opened in January 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Victoria Bridge on the SH6 over Kawarau River, New Zealand.

My2jRuT.name: Napoleonica
My2jRuT.description: Short and not high line perfect for begginers.

aXH_vfj.name: Tivoli
aXH_vfj.description: Most obvious longer line to us at this spot.

adGViHz.name: Boven Highline
adGViHz.description:
5 bolts with hangers on either side. 
Quicklinks are vital.  Some extra slings may need to be used to extend master point over the edge. There is an easy scramble up and down both sides. Line can be accessed from the farm house or Tranquilitas cam...

mSTMx4Y.name: Solsticij
mSTMx4Y.description: Not as high line but goes to edge of rock wall. It has nice view on Kamen castle, Begunje and surrounding mountains.

_DI0dG1.name: The Elora Line
_DI0dG1.restriction:
partial: Access here is based on us following the rules below.
If you're on the other side of the fence you must be tied into a personal anchor system if you are within 3m of the cliff edge. All anchors must use at least two trees even if you have one massive bomber tree to rig off of.

kpdbbK7.name: Batracio Lunar
kpdbbK7.description: Beautiful 25m highline in La Muralla, in the State of Querétaro.

o-ZDlVD.name: Highline Beleza Amazônica - Cachoeira da Neblina
o-ZDlVD.description:
Highline easy to assemble. Line established on 12/11/2016 by team formed by: Leandro Barroncas, Saulo Balieiro, Deilon Marques, Yana Hara and Juscelino Costa. Both anchors are easily accessible. Cordelete can be passed when crossing the formed lake swimming from one end to the other. Any questions, contact Leandro Barroncas via facebook or instagram.

Highline fácil de montar. Linha aberta em 12/11/2016 por equipe formada por: Leandro Barroncas, Saulo Balieiro, Deilon Marques, Yana Hara e Juscelino Costa. Ambas ancoragens de fácil acesso. Cordelete pode ser passado ao atravessar o lago formado nadando de uma ponta a outra. Quaisquer dúvidas, contatar Leandro Barroncas via facebook ou instagram.

19GKiVz.name: Saint antonin - 100m
19GKiVz.description:
Highline de 100m de Saint Antonin Noble Val.
Elle part a coté de la 80, du belvédère pour aller a gauche de la faille caractéristique en face.

VFpRp5l.name: Juo Dam Highline 190m
VFpRp5l.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

APLA9Mx.name: Basti im Glück
APLA9Mx.description:
Tree to tree anchor.
Does not matter which tree there.
Just find the open line between the trees

GzIjCuC.name: Highline da Pedra da Gavea - By Hugo Langel

p3ame-Q.name: Pączusie
p3ame-Q.description: Nice line next to a climbing sector

5S51spP.name: Mala mujer la planta
5S51spP.description: Buena linea para caminar o freestyle.

9gExrJg.name: Ornk Rute
9gExrJg.description: True highline above ferrata Hvadnik. Very nice view on the Julian Alps mountains.
9gExrJg.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien for air traffic info.

1uDeZMh.name: бухта Средняя Лагерная
1uDeZMh.description: Деревья на каждой станции. Чтобы пробросить реп-шнур нужен или квадрокоптер, или сбрасывать с двух сторон, и связывать внизу. Подъезд на автомобиле

1BNZ0xO.description: Rescpet the area, and have fun, remeber always leave clean and don't disturb

yKjMyHE.name: Faerie Graveyard
yKjMyHE.description: Maybe the longest you can safely rig here..

cjzO_wn.description: The Goat. Super nice line with panoramic view to old town of Bakhchisaray.

0n7ekvS.name: Brezza di Sicilia
0n7ekvS.description:
Beautifull Highline on the Scogliera near San Vito lo Capo.
The Line is on Top of the Climbing Wall.

ss6oSuV.name: The Spire
ss6oSuV.description: Krótsza taśma na Lost Arrow Spire. Stanowisko z camów + bolt na back-up na odstrzelonej płycie na ścianie, stanowisko na turnii z boltów do wyboru

-PUpHyc.name: Costa Del Sol
-PUpHyc.description: Overlooking Llandudno's south beach and Conwy Sands, this line has a stunning exposure view and soaks in the evening sun.

rivFeJO.name: Scrambled Tofu
rivFeJO.description: "Scrambled Tofu", a fun-to-rig, all-natural highline that soaks the sunshine year round and blocks wind from the North. Recommended at night as the city lights shine behind the highliner! Rigged by the Dunedin Slackliners :)

whj0cnD.description: Please note that the Kostolec gorge is open for climbing, therefore also fo highlining from 15.6. untill 31.12. In spring and in winter climbing is forbiden due to birds nesting there. Tension side: there is 10mm hole for screw in bolt for positio...

pbH3fa6.name: No Base Jumping
pbH3fa6.description: A unique deep cove on the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore with excellent highline potential.

yka1-Cu.description: Above Il Mito rock climbing crag

sHydpOr.name: Through the muck
sHydpOr.description: Look for the Fishing line which has been run through two bolts to be used for pulling rope through for ascent. Set of 3 glue-ins atop the the first column and beam on the west side, access by ascending column. Second anchor is the cypress tree acr...

VrMPbhq.name: Pierożek
VrMPbhq.description: Nice line for begining and training.

bJReh2F.name: Orcanator
bJReh2F.description: Nice spot with incredible view over the ocean. Easy acces from the road and tolerated camping options on the otherside of the road.

CKMKGc0.name: Siedemdziesiątka
CKMKGc0.description: This is a private area. If you have questions, ask Urban Highline Festival.

5FpgxPu.name: Down in the vallis
5FpgxPu.description: Only worth it if you are in the area..

VMIaZeB.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

KwgNuEh.name: Agro Gully Line
KwgNuEh.description: A good, more moderately long highline at Smith Rock

Nbi6XGb.name: Mexico Mágico
Nbi6XGb.description: La linea más larga dentro de este cañon

AO4DoAw.name: Dragonfly
AO4DoAw.description: High waterline. Falling down into water in the middle is safe :)

nsPR9LG.name: Memento Mori
nsPR9LG.description: Probably the nicest highline I rigged so far, great length to height ratio. Line is located in Kostolecká gorge and goes right next to the great arch.

8Qz2uGz.description: Shapito. Nice line for newbies, quite easy to rig and giving fun.

BFOMU04.name: Feliz Ano Novo
BFOMU04.description: Área particular, deixar o carro na placa de entrada do pico montenegro. Preserve!. Lado A: 4 parabolts de 10 (levar 4 chapeletas de 10) + 1 corda de 80 a 100 mts para ancoragem + cavalete. Lado B 40 metros de corda 4 bolts removíveis ou 4 parabolt...

yZMNSHl.name: SoHigh
yZMNSHl.description:
never installed, but sure possible
the rock is not the best, we have to test it if we can use regular bolts
an other option would be natural anchors, please check out the sport first

Xyr9RLy.name: El ojo
Xyr9RLy.description: Solo se ha montado una vez mayo info @soldorado_col esto gracias a @jchrise el criss de Valencia abriendo puntos épicos junto a el inglés Txalbi Germán Alex Parri y peru la energía muchachos

s07uwxt.name: Newbie highline
s07uwxt.description:
3 glued 12mm bolts on one side + natural backup
3 glued 12mm bolts on the other side + through the bend 2 big stones as backup
Bring hangers with you

vsDACzX.name: Falcons take off
vsDACzX.description: Falcons take off is a fun 20m line with easy access to both sides. Finding the spot is done by going to the cattle yard crag, and following the orange markers to the rock face. Side one has 3 main expansion bolts, and one gluein back up. Side two has 3 main and one back up also, but one of the bolts is 10mm instead of 12mm. Bring hangers! Beautiful outlook over the lake, you will also likely end up hanging out with local climbers or falcons.

Yq8B1cQ.name: El Juguete
Yq8B1cQ.description: Https://youtu.be/xRLdSB9ta2U. 3 bolts each side. One side easy to access, to get to the other anchor short rappel is needed

X7O0Gtu.name: El Tambo
X7O0Gtu.description: Highline con vistas espectaculares a 4000 m.s.n.m. Tierra privada, Hacienda el Tambo, para acceder contactarse al +593 987682823

wkL9hgq.name: Mother's Cake
wkL9hgq.restriction: partial: Line is located on private property. For now the owner seems to enjoy the presence of the lines, but please be friendly and respectful when approached about it! Also make absolutely sure you leave the spot cleaner than you found it.

tgXPnVw.name: Respeite meu medo!
tgXPnVw.description:
Highline de fácil acesso e o mais longo que temos em Campinas. A montagem requer alguém embaixo da pedreira para fazer o tagline ou utilizando drone.
Montagem tranquila sem necessidade de acesso.

EXAKl8S.name: Batline
EXAKl8S.description:
A midle line, not very high but really beautiful in border of the cave. The line was first laid on March 1, 2024. Be careful with the leash, as it can hit the rocks if you're too close to the anchors. You need to present you at Green Climber Home for installation. It's perfect spot because you can sleep and eat nearly at the line. 

Video : https://youtu.be/nE8rczldK-U?si=jx2g9_3g7bqLO8Ti

WZPWzT0.name: El Gigante
WZPWzT0.description: Primera linea en este spot. Corta pero precisosa

Em8VB_M.name: Druga obrambna linija
Em8VB_M.description: Very good climbing area with a relief feature that was just calling for highline. From small rock spike to overhang spine in the wall. Both sides are vertical wall almost all the way down.  The canyon is full of natural pools. It can be very windy here.

5oxfYP-.name: Plan D
5oxfYP-.description: The longest highline in Poland so far. Established on 26.10.2020 by Adam Kaminski, Kamil Dudek, Kuba Baldych and Kuba Morawski. 70m high on the highest point

LE4cON6.name: Chainsaw Massacre
LE4cON6.description: A beautiful line over Marshall's gulch

5M351Qi.name: Northern Swingers
5M351Qi.description: Big line over high over the pool.

AJs0_hb.name: 150 soles
AJs0_hb.description: Linea perfecta para caminar, muy probable que te toque con viento. Una vista preciosa y exposicion única.

UdBsD0T.name: Bajulaz N°5
UdBsD0T.description: Ligne à l'intérieur du cirque de la Bajulaz, au-dessus d'un vide fort accueillant. Magnifique vue sur le Lac d'Annecy.

tFoClmD.name: Opran možgan
tFoClmD.description: Great line above watefall. Cannot be rigged simultaneously with 113m.
tFoClmD.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien before rigging for air traffic info.

QVsN_99.name: Regretamin
QVsN_99.description: A line in memory of the person that drowned here..

dKpYLgq.restriction: full: Slackline it's forbidden it's a natural Park

rlROm6x.name: Marwil III
rlROm6x.description: On either side two concrete poles

leaRs6A.name: The Duck’s Nuts
leaRs6A.description: A diagonal line across the top of Waterfall Gorge

wlAKQ4j.name: Pedra Nayara
wlAKQ4j.description: Local próximo a cidade, com fácil acesso. O fato dos pontos de ancoragem estarem fixados na laje da cachoeira, as vias só podem ser montadas no período de seca, quando o nível do rio está baixo. (Abril a Setembro.)

y6t7LQP.name: Premiers pas (first steps)
y6t7LQP.description: A short line, not very high but easy to access. A 5-minute walk from the Kuravan Kurathi Statue. The line was first laid on November 29, 2023. Be careful with the leash, as it can hit the rocks if you're too close to the anchors. This line is ideal for learning to stand up and taking your first steps, but not for more experienced highliners.

Fhtl6Hk.name: North Gaulton Castle
Fhtl6Hk.description: Rigged by the 'Flying Frenchies' for the film Petit Bus Rouge

9oVVBld.name: Lion's Valley Park Gap
9oVVBld.description: Straight shot across the entire LVP from trees next to the bridge.

d0QF1L-.name: la 33
d0QF1L-.description: Need to throw the tag line. Might need to a few branches rappeling from the line. Respect climbers. 4 12mm bolts on each side. bring hangers

D-Q1fiB.name: Avorazadas y Atascadas
D-Q1fiB.description: Estas dos lineas (55s) pueden llegar a tener surf debido a los anclajes

pmiyjRB.restriction: partial: Police shows up almost everytime since its very popular for regular people to visit

pdAxOGJ.name: KWIaTEK
pdAxOGJ.description: You can't highlining there without a permission.

FeTQTgk.name: Łopata Mamy
FeTQTgk.description: if you want go there contact with me 882-073-846

C7TxY0W.name: Apoteoza Autodestrukcji
C7TxY0W.description: Connection can be done without a drone (webbing on the bottom and taglines thrown from both sides), but the risk of webbing getting stuck in some bushes is relatively high. On the right side of the quarry (looking from the entrance), use an A-fram...

8SrQQPa.name: Meritum
8SrQQPa.description: One of the shortest lines in UHF

TB9fOpV.name: Kanjonas (aka Karolina)
TB9fOpV.description: There were some landslides during last Summer after strong rain-showers. Spot is much more open compared to current satellite view. Deeper area is widening after the winter. Nice exposure to Neris river and Vingis park beyond that

XMAslTs.name: El pájaro 🐦 congelado ❄️
XMAslTs.description:
El lugar es propiedad privada, “La montaña de don Lauro”, se puede pedir permiso para poder subir a los miradores de la montaña.
Son aproximadamente 2 km de la base de la montaña a los anclajes, es un camino de terracería con muchas rocas sueltas, que te llevan a una intersección, camino a los miradores, a la derecha es el mirador “el zopilote” ahí se encuentra en anclaje del lado dinámico. Y a la izquierda es el mirador “el águila” ahí se encuentra el anclaje lado estático.

_7CSipN.name: impiegati statali
_7CSipN.description: ask to torino sul filo form more info small rope is already there

yC3iWXE.name: Hajek na Fpince
yC3iWXE.description: Hajek znajduję się w budynku ścianki wspinaczkowej Fpinka

H985w6u.name: Skor Gasilska
H985w6u.description: Best line on the spot with strange rigging.

UNASWcZ.name: And so it begins
UNASWcZ.description:
For details contact Andrei or Matei from Slacksylvania
 slacksylvania@gmail.com or on fb https://www.facebook.com/slacksylvania/

VN3yEm_.name: Mørkgonga
VN3yEm_.description: Trees. 20 min walk from the parking. Follow signs to Mørkgonga

RaW1Job.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you turn right Sector 2

cBLgm_3.name: O Borze!
cBLgm_3.description: Access is really easy, car leave under the highline, road to the top is also easy. You should find a road (motocross road) to up, dont need to climb there.

flR0qVP.name: Cröt 1
flR0qVP.description: Highline at the Lezibrücke above Cröt
flR0qVP.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

uAEJPqA.name: The Tail
uAEJPqA.description:
Beautifully located line at a friendly length for begineers.
Bolted 13/7/25

1PDvXP-.name: ReBarbora
1PDvXP-.description: Beautiful line linking two obvious points above playground in the valley. Something is making this line quite harder than expected.

nQmCS6M.name: Abelhas azuis
nQmCS6M.description:
O acesso a pedreira é pela rua das pedreiras na subida de uma estrada de chão de uns 100m chega-se no lugar de deixar o carro e começar a trilha. a Trilha tem 2 minutos até a base da Pedreira. A pedreira possui muitas pedras soltas, por esta razão é necessário atenção tanto na montagem quanto para a desmontagem.
A passagem da linha é feita por baixo onde existe um plato grande que é possível caminhar e conectar um nylon.
Atenção a chegada de escaladores no local.
Cuidado pode haver marimbondos ( vespas) nas ancoragens.

otYLRmd.name: La Convencional
otYLRmd.description: Only rig and use for day. Derigg in the evening

9t1N2Vy.name: Kirby Cove
9t1N2Vy.description:
Highline over a beach with a spectacular view of the Golden Gate Bridge and San Francisco.
FA by Daniel Tulberg in April 2016. Much thanks to Daniel for fixing the access ropes and releasing the beta.
Be careful here! It is steep and very loose. There is a small flat spot just above the tree where you can lay your things. Tape and water bottles love rolling away.
If you're planning to rig Kirby Cove, please say hi and let us know on SF Slackers (https://www.facebook.com/groups/112437018916868/) :)

WaKaVnz.name: Tros de cep
WaKaVnz.description: Trees on both sides. On the slope side better to use some sling to create a hang frame and get some more altitude. On the cliff side two trees can be equalized. From Avoriaz you get into the golf pitch, from there you go straight to the cliff. Is ...

YceBRzo.name: full combo
YceBRzo.description: for highline-freestyle, but not actually very high. Very easy to access, and may be easy to conrtroll?

1aoL-sM.name: Oh my balls
1aoL-sM.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you just cross it and already arrive at the Sector 1 of La Cabrera

Zd4XRCo.name: Panther Creek Falls
Zd4XRCo.description: Easy approach and rig over a beautiful waterfal.

NJAE6uh.name: Learn to drive trailer Dave
NJAE6uh.description: My webbing got stolen here, the tail got cut off, so better to derig after sessionning. Road barrier on both sides. Leave the car on the inside bend, walk the road

-6zGmrO.name: Arena-95
-6zGmrO.description: Tree anchors at both ends, 2,5 and 3 m slings required

gE7fW0C.name: Keep ya head down
gE7fW0C.description: Over a flooded quarry, if you find it you won't be sorry..

yI7SgGD.name: DL Bliss
yI7SgGD.description: Beautiful line right next to the lake, relatively easy rig. No fall zone on static side. Expect to be cheered on by hikers, boaters, and paddleboarders on nice summer days. Go for a swim when you get hot. This is also the site of possibly the largest ever rope swing into water, rigged on different bolts by Mike Wilson in 2010.

FSEdb03.name: 8 ore e 3 mesi
FSEdb03.description: Natural anchor + 3 bolts on one side, 4 bolts on the other side

DhOdMdZ.name: Žrtveno jagnje
DhOdMdZ.description: Shortest line on the spot, but high in the middle. Nice tie in point.

9QwzjKB.name: Dornröschen
9QwzjKB.description:
Very complicated anchors
Southern side with 25m slings, A-Frame
Northwrn side on trees 15m far away.

QL3tU3p.name: Coliseum
QL3tU3p.description: Hard to rig. Get some slings, lot of rope. And a lot of free time. And 6-meters spansets.

LWe1Vcv.name: Lolotte
LWe1Vcv.description:
Really chilly spot for highlining during few days : hut, campsite, toilet, swimming hole, watefall at 5min from the lines.

Opened by the team "The Ekiwibrists" in February 2018.

nhEt5ia.name: Split Rock
nhEt5ia.description:
This quarry is located at the top of Milton Lane, park either side of the road before the farm turning..
To approach either follow the tarmac/gravel path through the gate and keep following around to the right,eventually you will see it..
The quicker route is through the turnstile and field, keep the hedge to your left and you will find a gate.. your there

hCYGPJx.name: Ensayo sobre la ceguera
hCYGPJx.description: Both anchors were done with removable bolts, to repeat this line I recommend to contact with local slackline group (Slackriders La Palma). With 4x4 car you can get close, so the hike is no longer than 30 min. With normal car count with 1-1,5h hike...

cm5CstM.name: Charlotte
cm5CstM.description: First line established over the dry quarry

Lx3r4f_.description:
You can change the lenght of the line by just going one hole closer or further.
You feel better the exposure when you walk face to the bridge. 
It's an easy rig, just be careful when you go to the other ancho and normally the police comes to say h...

jw9POy_.name: The One
jw9POy_.description:
This might be the most iconic line of the California Coastline, with a beautiful arched bridge framing the raw, rocky shore. The powerful waves of the Pacific are often smashing into the breakers, launching waves well above the height of the line, though at a safe distance.

The One was first rigged in 2010, and first sent in 2011. It has a short no-fall zone, as the arches of the bridge are close enough to hit during a whipper.

QpPCoYp.name: mochilla rodeante
QpPCoYp.description: ask to local TORINO SUL FILO for more info

VuBDjkf.name: Yo también me voy
VuBDjkf.description: You're in a natural parc, slackline is not allowed. Don't rig the line for long periods of time as you could get in trouble. Tree on one side, big boulder on the other (around 10m of sling / 20m of rope). From Benasque go up to Refugio de Coronas ...

AR9hfps.name: Mamma Mia!
AR9hfps.description: Astonishing spot! Right after village Charakas you will find canyon. There are two climbing sectors. Plenty options to rig a line from 20m up to 600 with a great see view.

PtaW7ar.description:
La ligne est dans un léger cirque, elle est proche du bord, mais il ne faut pas se laisser avoir par cela. Elle est full gaz et possède une ouverture terrifiante. 

La ligne offre une vue imprenable sur le Mont-Blanc et les Aravis.

rlxKJXL.name: Happy Birthday
rlxKJXL.description: The standout line across Mt Greville's 'Great Gully', with Moogarah dam photobombing every shot in such a great way. This line was sent for the first time by Mia Noblet on her birthday.

9XkoER5.restriction: partial: It's a very popular spot for regular visitors. Police show up every time. Be aware. There is no 'official' way to get permission.

mZga5mN.name: River project
mZga5mN.description: one of the biggest and pretty lines of the Cirat highline festival.  you need a dron

9PueSV9.name: Yati Ochi
9PueSV9.description:
A very nice line with some exposure and quite different than the others of Meteora, wilder. Very easy access and rigging, perfect for raining days or non-climbers highliners as there is no need to climb ! 
Open by :  Vassili Theodorou, Maurice Ammann, Laetitia Gonnon, January 2016

lNz5Tun.name: Slouse Juice
lNz5Tun.description: short highline/midline perfect for first highline

ZkqyxuR.name: Over Easy (the 1490)
ZkqyxuR.description: A big, beautiful line and a short approach. What's not to like?

bl_SOJ-.name: So ill
bl_SOJ-.description: 50ish meters bounce line directly above the shelter one waterfall.
bl_SOJ-.restriction: none: Located at state park above waterfall. Has potential to be permarigged.

nWHchZe.name: Rattlesnake Falls Highline
nWHchZe.description: Boulder wrap next to falls, Tree wrap across the way

EX4hY2s.description: From tree to tree next to Hanmer Bridge. First Send by Cheyne Pearson. Set up/ found spot Petr Polak, Jerome Alxiant, Fer Kpok.

EIg1Xh_.name: Sleklajn na zmaju sm
EIg1Xh_.description: Line from the pool to Stičić junction tower.

iY3XgAg.name: Telefonmann
iY3XgAg.description: Midline oder Highline, depends on the water level of the lake
iY3XgAg.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!

kCJ4IJk.name: Leśnik
kCJ4IJk.description: Probably longest line here. Beautifful place easy rig, super close from car.

G8i8c8V.name: Unnamed
G8i8c8V.description: Nice lil 50m line. More of a no fall zone than on Split Pea Soup but still a great line to cruise

Nms_vaR.name: Narava zajebava
Nms_vaR.description: Epic line, both side edge of rock.

e6wBbn-.name: 60m Highline at Bärenschlucht

rT-cKFp.name: Mama Africa
rT-cKFp.description: As we have been here in feb 2017, not all of the marokkan people reakted positive. There are some "responsibles" that maybe coul´d want yout to put the highline down. So my reccomandytion is to plan the well visible Highlines in the tour...

Fv2XaKl.name: Cascade des Thermes ???
Fv2XaKl.description:
Une des premières highlines de France. Il ne faut pas se fier à sa longueur, les falaises abrupte la rendent très gazeuse.

Magnifique ligne avec la cascade en arrière-plan. Elle est bruyante, mais elle devient féérique en hiver si elle gèle !

8jRwLmk.name: Abandoned boiler station
8jRwLmk.description: To rig highline you should climb on the second floor of construction. Also there is intense wind here. But roof and walls of this building are not destroyed finally...

ZqL0ylu.name: “Wild, man”
ZqL0ylu.description: Once you’re at the top of the trail you’ll follow rock Karen’s to the cliff edge where the bolts are. These are 5 inch p bolts set up in an equilateral triangle. Fairly steep hill with trail up the side, it’s steep but short

I_PTqhK.name: Ackermannbrücke Augsburg Midline
I_PTqhK.description: Midline, not a waterline, since the Wertach is typically too shallow. West anchor is the street light on the bridge. East anchor is a tree
I_PTqhK.restriction:
partial: We have been sent away by the police a couple of times (assertive but friendly).
The reason given is that drivers on the big road nearby would be distracted.
So when you want to rig here keep in mind it might become a very short session ;)

AGJCCGR.name: Ya pareces
AGJCCGR.description: 53m (L) x 70m (H),  One of Ecuador´s top lines. Just below the Chimborazo volcano, the country´s Highest location and the planet's closest point to the Sun : ) Below an incredible climbing park. Sport climb and trad.

Crew: Kamil Sustiak, Stepan Novikov, Alexandra Bogdanova

ul5ycsy.name: BABEL TOWER
ul5ycsy.description: To climb the tower you need trad equipment. It's about 100m high, we did it in 3 pitches with a single 60m rope. It's not difficult climbing, but there are lots of loose stones. It would be very helpful to make connection with a drone, but we mana...

2uV2j74.name: Mały Stasik

One side holes for screw bolts M10 (2m spanset).

y4Uf7d0.description:

xiT5laI.name: Inespérée - L : 42m
xiT5laI.description:
Linking :
Really hard, if you don't have a bow and arrow. We dropped a 160m rope from the Vase de Chine side to the ground, and then climbed the 120m west angle to link the two anchors.

Rigging :
The two anchors are suspended (no platform), so we used a removable pulley technic to get the line without any pulley in an anchor. The pulleys were installed on the Vase de Chine anchors. It is possible to use the weight of somebody to rig the line, because the cliff is overhanging. Rigging very engaged.

D2dKjA-.name: Baby steps
D2dKjA-.description: On the side of the gate it is easy to anchor directly to the drains on the wall, for the other side a strong tree is used not so on the shore

3k8sQhB.name: Left one (Левая)
3k8sQhB.description: Top of the crown of mount Induk.

_b55WlG.name: Emosson
_b55WlG.description: Line over the lake, first installed July 2023, separate signalisation line is required

VwrmZpp.name: Illusion of flying

Una linea en una quebrada al mar
se puede acampar en la playa del pueblo y es un lugar seguro

_RIuPs4.name: Prohibido el paso
_RIuPs4.description: Highline at Cap de Formentor. It takes a while to go there because its a super touristic place. I wouldn't go during the summer because its super crowded with cars and i heard that sometimes they close the road, only letting in tour buses

MZOMpi1.name: Getting hair on my inch worm

KmYfF3k.description: Magnifique ligne en parallèle de la première, un peu plus ouverte. Elle surplombe le lac d'Annecy, les montagnes en toile de fond, accès facile, installation facile, le combo parfait.
KmYfF3k.restriction:
partial: Pas besoin de NOTAM pour cette ligne, mais merci d'envoyer un message à la liste de mail, au moins 2 jours avant l'installation de la ligne.

Il faudra aussi appeler les deux numéros le matin de l'installation: 

Ce mail devra contenir :
- La date d'installation et de désinstallation de la ligne 
- La commune d'installation : La Thuile
- La longueur de la ligne : 300m
- L'Altitude de la ligne : 750m
- Les coordonnées des ancrages :
Ancrage 1 : 45° 48' 29" N, 6° 11' 51" E
Ancrage 2 : 45° 48' 38" N, 6° 11' 56" E

ELlPJC9.name: Andy's line
ELlPJC9.description: About an hour hike from parking, 24 direct but 240m added exposure with beautiful desert view. Easy rigg easily hand taggable.

VLPeKaZ.name: Little Wind
VLPeKaZ.description: First highline in Hejszowina. Really cool line for the first highline. Rigging from one side out of the steel structure of the viewpoint and on the other side sling a huge sandstone boulder. Has been freesoloed lately by Jan Gałek.

3vpo8sB.name: Txai Line - linha do txai
3vpo8sB.description:
This is one of the three lines that have been conquered in this location.  It goes right across the opening of the cave. This is a beautiful place in Chapada Diamantina Bahia anda its open for visitors. Two of the lines at this spot were conquered by me and my partner while traveling all over Brasil in search for spots to put up the most incredible Highlines. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
3vpo8sB.restriction: partial: get in touch at equilibrionomade@gmail.com

AwbXnSx.name: Medo de Chuva
AwbXnSx.description:
Linha de Highline aberta sobre o Canyon do Rio São Jorge. 
Devido ao desnível na altura do terreno, é necessário utilizar um Hang-Frame de pelo menos 1,5m no lado (A) da cachoeira para compensar a altura.

qR2vlbF.name: Beck Hole Viaduct
qR2vlbF.description: A nice low level line over the top of the higher waterfall in Beck Hole

NQe6xIs.name: Lots to learn
NQe6xIs.description: Beautiful spot with a sweet line over the water hole, watch out for the crowds though!

q8C_2Gi.name: Cats Crack
q8C_2Gi.description: A line from the outside to the middle pinnacles. This is one of the stand out lines on the mountain with the king position. This line is a bit of an adventure to get too so make sure you get an early start.

NW anchor four by threaded rod with rounded hangers

78OcK9r.name: Douceur d’automne

OG king line straight across the back of the quarry.
Tagline can be thrown in from both anchors and connected. Alternatively, it is possible to walk around. This must be done with caution near the cliff edge.
vGGhSui.restriction: none: Be respectful of climbers, this is a BMC owned quarry so if the climbers complain about slackliners then it will create access issues.

QcKyTMr.description: Between Old Easy and Friction Tower

6Z1Ut9U.restriction: partial: Only rig this line in winter or you will get into trouble quickly. No sleeping in vans/cara near the spot. The police will come and fine you. Highlining was forbidden here in the past, take care of the spot!

2x 12mm hanger 
2x 2,5m sling + 0,5m sling for slideing X 
backup on big clinbing glued rings near by,
anchor #2 
2x 12mm hanger 
2m sling, slideing X 
backup on bolts about 4-5m ...

With 2 ropes of 10m each you can build both anchors. From Benasque go up t...

It's protected area, but I don't think so that can be a problem. Anchorpoints are ready so you don't  damage anything. Just pad well the concrete blocks. 3 bolts on rock, you need hangers.
Another side is rigg to big concrete blocks that limit the...

e9LBnZ6.description: cette ligne n'existe pas (mal tracée sur la map), c'est celle à coté, les infos sont correct

E3NRO16.name: Wandoorer
E3NRO16.description: most of the line is over water, peaceful during weekdays. Lots of birds and wildlife around. plenty of shade and water to swim in if you get too hot (maybe keep your head out of the water though)

8dbMjVc.description: Attention la ligne ne peut pas être marché sur toute sa longueur. Plaquettes. Accès: Rappel sur les buis coté sud et Sur des plaquettes coté nord

R1w1lOs.name: El cabrón del león se rie de mi
R1w1lOs.description: Highline in el Cañon de Uceda, 114m rigged on parabolts on both sides

NkKmZ4s.description: Abandoned torpedo testing site from World War II

I0Joo_O.name: Little Porthgwarra
I0Joo_O.description: Big boulders on either side. Take lots of padding

yRBFtHy.name: Sheila
yRBFtHy.description: Pretty cool line giving a 360 view of oakura bay, best walked during sunset and sunrise. Keep an eye out as dolphins are common in the area. During high tide the headland becomes an island

tBqJXgh.name: la cecille
tBqJXgh.description: No permission needed, parking at 300 m

yh6sZVS.description:
Mid-Waterline (Waterline also possible, water is 2.5m deep).

Also as of 02/2023 we have a permaline rigged here (there is a sign with phone numbers in the tree).

To get to the other side either swim or use the old bridge ~500m south.

Please respect the closed for traffic sign and leave your car at the parking lot.

r-9rzZG.name: Ajdnovi žganci
r-9rzZG.description:
Other side view line on Ajdna. 
Steel wires are in a way. But can be moved if put back.

drhbmkE.name: Laser
drhbmkE.description:
1. Anchor point: has 4 M12 bolts with plates on it .Easy access ancoring with short spansets with no dangerous edge
2. Anchor point: Has 2 M12 bolts with plates on them. They are locate on the back of a rock, padding for a 4m long spanset required, also the line on this side goes 1m above the rockso a crashpad is advisible for the backup if the main line breaks. Backup on a three and a M10 bolt with a plate still on it. 

Beautiful 25m high line with a nice expousure :)

l7vzNYX.name: Windsurfer
l7vzNYX.description: The line is really exposed on the W side, and has a nice place on the E side for people to sit on the ground and watch, on the South anchor, the cliff goes straight down, and on the Northern side of the line, it goes in between 2 trees.
l7vzNYX.restriction: partial: It is a national park, so respect the people, and the animals, don't feed the animals, try to not disturb the nature, and most importantly, try to leave no trace, take with you all the trash, and hang the food, so the animals can't get it.

5mYIhI-.name: 55m
5mYIhI-.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members. Like in Belgium KBF or CAB

44X1NQ-.name: Caverna do Dragão - Cave of the Dragon
44X1NQ-.description:
This is the first line that was conquered in Gruta do Lapão. When I first went there in 2023 it already existed but I don´t know for sure who were the people behind this mission on the first occasion. 
Me and my partner went and set up the line on the 23 of february of 2023 and then we came back in november 2024 and put up two more lines along side this one. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.

p_4lMxz.name: limonada de mango
p_4lMxz.description: highline de anclajes naturales por el frente de una cascada de ochenta metros

2lt66Np.name: East is a delicate matter
2lt66Np.description: 2 pieces of 40м rope. Spansets 12m in total with protection. By ladder

ikoyNCu.name: Amor de lejos
ikoyNCu.description: Ubicado en el peñon un highline muy escénico

4Z0op-v.name: Wet Beaver (the 92)
4Z0op-v.description: The desert ecosystem around the Fruit Bowl can be very fragile.  DO NOT gather wood for firewood; bring your own if you want a campfire.  Also, stick to established footpaths so as to not disturb the cryptobiotic soil.  Human waste has been an iss...

lQq8YOY.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki

J8d03hU.name: fusilla
J8d03hU.description:
very easy to access. the line stays right above the casa cantoniera restourant (very king and helpfull owner and staff) parking lot. you can camp overnight and there's water, a lot.
for infos find SLACKLINE BRESCIA ASD on facebook and ask us!

DpD1oBT.name: West Cape Howe
DpD1oBT.description:
65m Line around the climbing crags at West Cape Howe National Park. It is the furtherest point south in WA (next stop south is Antarctica).
Beautiful, not too exposed, often windy and a lot of salt spray.

3f4xGZx.name: Hall of Horrors
3f4xGZx.description: Super fun and aesthetic beginner highline at the Hall of Horrors in JTree! There are some good trad and sport climbing routes in this immediate area as well.

CcsjEYA.name: Scarier Than Sex
CcsjEYA.description: Main om Level line across the pool of the quarry

V5lThGv.name: O Presente secreto
V5lThGv.description: The secret is a beautiful highline, located between the soft beach and Joaquina beach, on a secret beach, the first giant highline of the island of florianopolis, chemical anchorage, with abseiling access on the north side, and access by trail on the side south.

Dk8ubxs.name: Cromagnon
Dk8ubxs.description: Highline straight over the main gap of Natural Bridge, right over the waterfall.

bPQXQ5e.name: HS 40
bPQXQ5e.description: Shorter OG line fairly well sheltered. CAUTION - this line must be rigged with a high stretch webbing or bungees. Webbing can be walked around the gap with no obstruction.
bPQXQ5e.restriction: none: Be respectful of climbers, this is a BMC owned quarry so if the climbers complain about slackliners then it will create access issues.

uhbU4tO.description: An easy to rig longer highline in a decent climbing area. 10min from car to either anchor.

LPpCT6F.name: High Level Dreams
LPpCT6F.description: Restricted access. Rig this line discreetly. Early weekend morning.

ivB5DcP.name: Polêmica
ivB5DcP.description:
This line took many weeks to be set up and conquered, with no drone, the line was passed crossing by foot and bypassing the vegetation.  We were able to camp and live on the spot for weeks just training and having fun, we also received many visitors, including many of which who had never went on a Highline before. So we initiated many people on the line. There were gatherings and many beautiful moonlit nights at this place, I´m thankfull for this experience. This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while traveling all over Brasil in search for spots to put up the most incredible Highlines. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
ivB5DcP.restriction: partial: This line is called "Polêmica" because eventually after many weeks leaving on the spot and receiving visitors from all over the Diamantina , We were asked to take down the line and threatened to receive penaltys by the local ICMBIo (the guards of the national park area)

eFiJSo7.name: Surfista dos Pampas
eFiJSo7.description:
PT: highline de 26m com acesso e instalação fácil. 
Base#1 (à menos exposta, lado Sudoeste) com duas chapas para a instalação da ancorarem principal; uma chapa de 12mm en inox colocada 18/02/2016, a outra de diâmetro menor ja estava presente, em relativo bom estado; mais dois pontos estão presentes mais para tras, usei estes para o backup. Usei a Base#1 para a tensão da fita. Recomendo utilizar uma mochila ou algo semelhante como A-frame logo abaixo do "main point" da ancoragem principal.

Base#2: do lado Leste, Nordeste, mais exposto lado oceano, ancoragem principal em três pontos, eu usei duas equalisaçoes (ver foto); cuidado a chapa do lado mais externo da pedra esta bem enferrujada e nao recomendo sua utilização. Substitui esta por um ponto novo, 12mm inox colocado 18/02/16. backup primeiro no "main point" e depois amarrado ao redor do bloco de pedra logo atras da ancorarem. Precisa proteger bem os slings da ancoragem contra abrasão na pedra.

--

EN: 26m highline with easy access and installation.
Base # 1 (the least exposed on South-West side) with two plates for the installation of the main anchor; 12mm inbox bolt placed 02/18/2016, the other bolt has smaller diameter and it was already present in relative good condition; two points are also present further back, used these for backup. I used the Base # 1 for the tension. I recommend using a backpack or something similar as an A-frame just below the "main point" of the main anchor.

Base # 2: East Side, Northeast, more exposed ocean side, main anchor with three points, I used two equalisations (see photo); be careful NOT TO USE the bolt on the outer side of this stone, it is badly rusted and I do not recommend its use. Replaced this with a new 12mm stainless bolt placed 02/18/16. backup first in the "main point" and then tied around the stone block just behind the anchor. Need to protect the slings against abrasion with the rock.

TmmgNwS.name: Objectif lunules
TmmgNwS.description:
Ligne ouverte par Antoine Mesnage, Ma Ho, Nathan et Clovis Paulin en 2019. 

/!\ Les points côtés Pointe Percée ont été enfoncés, il est toujours possible de mettre la ligne avec les lunules percées et un point d'escalade. /!\

La légende raconte qu'ils sont montés avec tout le matériel pour équiper la ligne, mais qu'ils ont oublié les goujons.

L'ouverture a donc été faite sur les lunules, puis elle a été équipée en 2025.

Ligne accessible unique via l'arête du doigt, ce qui fait un combo vraiment magnifique. L'approche, la grimpe et la highline représentent une bonne grosse journée. Mais la ligne en vaut clairement le coup. Vue imprenable sur tous les massifs environnants.

Ka4iHnz.name: Acarajé de 5 reais
Ka4iHnz.description:
This line was a dream invisioned many years before it was actually done. Giovanne, my partner, used to go there and always dream of walking and conquering this spot, but at the time he didn´t have enought webbing to cross the whole distance. In december 2024, after 3 years he came back and finally we could do it. We invited our friends who live in Ilhéus to help out and enjoy our days camping by the beach and highlining everyday. The name of the line is in honour of the best and cheapest acarajé ever, only found in ilhéus. This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while travelling all over Brasil looking for spots. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in Bahia, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
Ka4iHnz.restriction: none: This line has no specific restriction but after a couple of days of walking on the line, the navy military asked us to take down because it could cause trouble in case of a big ship crossing below the bridge, so we took this one down and set up another line, closer to the coast and out of the way of the ships. In reality, only small boats pass in this area.

GPH3DAk.name: Primeira do Tocantins - Cachoeira da Roncadeira
GPH3DAk.description: First Highline ever in the state of Tocantins, and still the only one. We were invited to rig this Highline by Freestyle atlhete Gabriel Pereira, he is from the state of Tocantins and dreamt of accomplishing the first Highline ever in his state. This was one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while travelling all over Brazil in search for spots to set up the most incredible Highlines where no one had ever seen such thing, we went up north and expanded the highline frontier for new eyes to see.

crossing the ocean to the needle: only when waves are tiny and currents are low... at least take a bodyboard with you. watch the ocean. stay away from the rocks strong current. can be very dangerous!!!

VWzWKBC.name: Carousel
VWzWKBC.description:
One of the most beautiful highlines out there ;-) The point of view can almost be reached by car. From there 5min hiking to the close anchor point where we bolted in stainless M12. 4 bolts between 2m and 4m from the cliff. An anchor point more to the north closer to the greek flag might make sense! This would make the line go longer - about 650m long. But the line we rigged was 60m off-level! An anchor point more to the north could bring this down to about 40m off-level which is totally OK for a 600m+line. But nothing is bolted there yet. 

The far anchor point is a bit more of a hike. Take good shoes. It's 20 min hiking. A tree 15m behind the cliff can be taken as anchor point. No bolts as the rock is shit on this side. The line is 30m off-level! Btw.: The beach can not be reached by foot. 80m repelling down on loose rocks to get to the beach - last 20m overhanging! So be careful if you plan to go down there or take a tourist ship :-p

R-pkQyo.name: "Un camino con las mariposas"
R-pkQyo.description: Es el primer highline en Veracruz y para montar la "Linea de humo" hay que poner esta primero. atraviesa la mitad del sotano y directo hacia la cascada.

Dylan Bennett Hoel Yugg Miguel Obrien

vO7N-p2.name: The 230m
vO7N-p2.description:
/!\ You'll need to ask permission to the mayor, go to the spot page to see the protocol.
A stunning line which encloses the sector with great views in both directions.

The left side anchor was originally rigged using 27m of spansets to equalise nine bushes! The 170m bolts have since been repurposed for this line.

Watch out for the bolts on a loose rock next to the left side anchor bolts, these should absolutely not be used for main or backup.

An eye should be kept on the weather when rigging this line as it is quite exposed to wind.

9qi-6UY.name: Malak'highline
9qi-6UY.description:
A nice (mid)line, not very high but quite long (probably the longest in Greece so far ?) and with amazing view and surroundings. You can climb and highline on the same day !

Open by : Tanassis Sotir, Laetitia Gonnon, Maurice Ammann in February 2016

o1CVuEP.description: This line was made possible by the invitation of mago do equilibrio, matheus vidal, who dreamed of making this happen at his hometown. We went on his kombi motorhome from São Paulo to Itamaraju, Bahia during Christmas 2022. We got to Itamaraju and stayed by vidal´s family home, getting to know his parents who are fishermen and his grandparents who live on a little farm in Itamaraju. This line at the time, was a record breaker for the biggest Highline in Bahia and in the whole northeastern of Brasil. A group of crazy and young hippies, some with great experience and some just getting on the road for the fist time. We once called ourselves "chorumes na estrada" and almost ran away with the circus and started a company to put on shows. But none of this happened, except for the Highline, that was a dream that came true. The 500 meter Highline was born on the 31st and walked on the first day of the year 2023.

Wpcj_Yt.name: Allium Victorialis
Wpcj_Yt.description:
ATTENTION : DES PLANTES PROTÉGÉES POUSSENT SUR LE SITE. Réduisez votre impact au minimum. Soyez discrets (pas de musique), évitez de dormir sur le site (il y a un chalet CAF, ou alors campez en dehors des zones protégées) Dans le bosquet qui sert d'ancrage à la 45m pousse naturellement un parterre de fleurs blanches qui sentent l'ail. Elles sont très rares et à laisser tranquille impérativement, sous peine d'interdiction de la highline sur le site Si vous montez la 45m, faites les ninjas pour ne pas toucher les fleurs. La police de l'environnement veille (vraiment). La 115 porte le nom de la plante : Allium Victorialis.                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                              
           Super jolie ligne, ouverte en Juin 2018. Ancrages naturels sur arbres, prévoir deux A-Frames de 1m de haut environ, et beaucoup d'élingues (14m côté sud et 9m côté nord). Prendre les arbres tout en bas en tête d'alouette et prolonger jusqu'au A à 1m du bord. pour le passage de ligne, faire le tour à pied est possible mais engagé, un drone serait idéal. Bonne slack !

ryX9xS0.name: Mirna Bosna
ryX9xS0.description: Pure epic line from top of tower to top of other tower. Both anchors easily reachable so you can walk just one direction. Connection can be made by zipline.

l7uXLaH.name: Forever Young

Oi4_Xez.name: Dva trakova i jedan pas

2RMVXTe.description: Super fun line with exposure view to Alushta and Ghost valley.

6PL4V4Q.name: la de Ricardo
6PL4V4Q.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you turn right Sector 2

pbjkw_z.name: Todes são bem vindes  "All are welcome"
pbjkw_z.description:
This is the second line at this spot, it was only done to respect the navy´s wish to take the line out of the way of the ships and keep the trip going. 
This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while hitchhiking all over Brasil in searh for Highline spots. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in Bahia, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.

JwUDBYa.name: Metabief
JwUDBYa.description:
Se garer au parking le plus proche de la falaise. Longer la falaise vers le nord jusqu'à trouver le spot (évident), à mi-chemin entre les téléskis. Accès plus difficile en hiver.


Park on the closest parking to the cliff. Walk north along the cliff, you can't miss the spot. Harder to access in wintertime.

Dn7Mi0a.name: Alfombra Roja
Dn7Mi0a.description: More info: slacklinecanarias@gmail.com. 3 chemical anchors each side

bJPLUJl.name: Symonds Yat
bJPLUJl.description:
Rigged from trees on observation deck to slings around the pinnacle. People have been known to sling around a small chunk on the pinnacle in the past which resulted in boulders being pulled off the top. Sling around the entire pinnacle to avoid this. 

DO NOT BOLT. The valley is a conservation area and is also used by trad climbers. Access is fairly simple down from the car park at top of hill. 
Abseil down from the observation deck to the bottom where you'll find a cave (which acts as a great camping spot). From here, you can access the base of the pinnacle and climb up. Trad gear is required, but the route is a relatively easy scramble up the south face. 

No known issues with the local authorities. Use appropriate protection, rig wisely and leave the spot as you found it, and you should be fine.

coXk-rl.name: Cheburashka
coXk-rl.description:
Most beautiful highline I have yet walked! 
Bolted and first walked by Matt, Paula, Reto and Laura

Careful: 
1. The marked spot in the map is probably not the exact spot, we don't have GPS data
2. You'll need some climbing/mountaineering skills to get there or at least move safely in alpine grounds..

O2PUBs_.name: No tengo el chocho pa farolillos

BqNUtI-.name: Expose Your Waterballs

rBDrwnN.name: Si això és guerra
rBDrwnN.description: There's a road underneath. Take it into account when doing the connection. 3 bolts on each side (12mm on the dynamic anchor, North and 10mm on the static side, South). No hangers on place. Easy access from the bridge on the road

mStzKh7.name: Que no vingui la pau

j67eSmT.name: Stig of the Dump

q-xnQ0w.name: Coffeeshop

A line over the canyon towards the hut in the wall.

fdDxd4u.name: taft 170
fdDxd4u.description:
First and foremost- please be aware that there are no campsites on taft point and that the park would not like any line left unattended.  Following these simple rules helps keep our access open to amazing places such as Taft, and all of Yosemite.  
The Taft 170 is one of those iconic lines with great exposure, and if you exposure turn in the in the middle, you get one of the best views of El Capitan in the valley.  Bomber anchors with a bit of padding and you are good to go.  Huge exposure makes this line a bit more heady than its distance alone suggests.  Taft is a great first stop in the valley.  If you rig this line, please be ready for and expect large crowds of tourists watching, asking questions, and taking pictures.  The group I rigged it with made signs that explain what highlining is and that cut down on a bit of the conversation, but not much.  Nice drops make for 0 no fall zones.  Overall a safe rig, and line if you do it right.
