/!\ You'll need to ask permission to the mayor, go to the spot page to see the protocol.
An alternative to the classic 65m line which is simpler to rig and access in the sense that no rappelling is required.

TyJNyI_.description: First highline on bigger querry in Chwałków

sFl-Fxl.name: La Rebelión del Sur
sFl-Fxl.description: A Highline above the biggest open air cenote in Mexico near a town called Miguel Colorado

cSnz9yi.name: Michael’s Line
cSnz9yi.description: First line established at the Balcony. This line can't be rigged simultaneously with the 201m line.

oHiOJ6W.name: Rock and Spindle
oHiOJ6W.description: Need static rope and protection to sling around the Rock and the Spindle

cFK6VEX.name: Luna Lobo
cFK6VEX.description: Short highline in Los Picachos area in Peña de Bernal.

wzTf4vw.name: FLYING MOON SOUP
wzTf4vw.description: Natural anchors, 40-50kg of equipment depending, multi point anchors possible left hand side 3 point anchor sliding X Used 2 Hexes and one 2.5m Spanset, 25m static rope for main, left hand side 18m static for main off boulder and one 4m spanset

QV0sXnd.name: Pente'dévalée
QV0sXnd.description:
Very beautiful line, not so high especially at the beginning, but with a very very beautiful view and exposure to the vallée of Vénosc and the Pic of Vénosc.

Easy to rig as the tagline can be crossed by walking, but be aware that it is steep.

7yFwKOa.description:
Bolts on top of the citadel for home side. Bring a wrench to re-adjust anchor angles.
For the far side wrap the top of the tower with two 12 foot spansets or similar. Having a climber with you is helpful for accessing anchors

i8Rsi95.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

Vd6tHIK.name: Wisha's Luck
Vd6tHIK.description: This is a very fun highline to play on. Located at a local swimming hole you will be among many other people who are swimming, cliff jumping, and just having fun! This is a great summertime highline! Crush the line and then immediately afterward swim in some cold, refreshing water. The tagging / rigging is extremely easy, There is just one dead branch (about 10 feet off the ground) that gets in the way of tagging. The no fall zones on each side stretch for about the first 10 feet of the line.

v1t5gTt.name: Half Bitch
v1t5gTt.description:
Nice beginner line. Only about 15m of walking but a big landing to harness up and get your rollex on the line without standing on a cliff edge. 

The line splits the gap right in front of the waterfall. The anchor on the far side is a standalone tree about 10m from the cliff edge, the other anchor is on the near side. (Stand at the far anchor tree and look across the gap to the tree on the cliff edge beyond the two trees in the gulch.)
v1t5gTt.restriction: partial: Contact "forest@louisvilleky.gov" with the date you plan on visiting along with your vehicle info to get the access code to the gate.

Me9GY38.name: Glej in se čudi, kaj ti Gorenjska nudi
Me9GY38.description: Line with the best view on lake Bled.

v4m4DC9.description: For this line you have to ask the owner of the area first. He lives near the big farmer building, close to it. He is a nice guy. Some days in summer he makes the field

ljo2zje.name: Mirroir d'Argentine
ljo2zje.description: Installed 2022 very delicate, climbers below the line

Mntyj_y.name: Cat's Mane
Mntyj_y.description: A line from the the middle pinnacles back to the main face. This is one of the stand out lines on the mountain with it being in a superb position. This line is a bit of an adventure to get too so make sure you get an early start.

DkOTHDU.name: Rebojo
DkOTHDU.description: O vento nessa linha forma movimento de rotaçao

9YNpV7n.name: Vipavtocesta
9YNpV7n.description: Low line but witch nice view on the canyon and river. First 25m from east are near trees so a no leash fall zone.

o7Haus1.name: Buchenegger Wasserfall
o7Haus1.description: easy to rig and about 40m over the first pool of that waterfall.

qBmdCq3.name: C'est l'Amour
qBmdCq3.description: Rigged to the middle of the waterfall!

HgDw7Zh.name: Bernardo's line
HgDw7Zh.description:
A perfect line for beginners. Short and not too high but still quite exposed and very nice, with very easy access and rigging. Enjoy the view above the village !

Open by : Michael Schreiber, Moritz Wohlauf, Laetitia Gonnon, Maurice Ammann, in February 2016

r3i8-0L.name: Drone Crusher
r3i8-0L.restriction: partial: Line is located on private property. For now the owner seems to enjoy the presence of the lines, but please be friendly and respectful when approached about it! Also make absolutely sure you leave the spot cleaner than you found it.

i4ZfbJg.name: An Abomination
i4ZfbJg.description: I named the line "An Abomination" because of the effort it took to rig this short line.

iR44iTu.name: Nido d'amore
iR44iTu.description: 4 bolts per side, 2 for the line and 2 for the backup. 2m sling needed. Easy to reach in 20 min from Rifugio Melano following the path in red (any doubt ask to Rifugio Melano)

hdsHXmz.description: Buena linea para hacer freestyle, spot fresco y rico

TRZkHh-.description: Radio Induk. An interesting line on the mountain Induk. The place is very popular among climbers, and now a highline is available.

WrRXrDx.name: Pleasant screams and Maori dreams
WrRXrDx.description: Big line with a lot of work, has an awesome view of the coast and beautiful beach below. Please be respectful as the tension side is the ancient site of a PA and Maori chief dwelling

Tx6JV4i.name: Stalusa 105
Tx6JV4i.description: Nice Highline with some gaso below in the wild canyon of Val Russein.
Tx6JV4i.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

t6FqMER.name: Char sad roub kam
t6FqMER.description: one of the longest longhighline have been rigged in Iran by Iranian team (EAL PROJECT)

0fyZHc1.name: Race Condition
0fyZHc1.description: Part way between Where Swallows Fly and Dogfight, rigged off a small tower that overlooks the Marsupials.

4hfVKs4.name: san bernardo
4hfVKs4.description: one of the paralel church lines of the festival.

fa6rZij.name: Slacklinersofbristol
fa6rZij.description: slackliners of bristol is a dream line on top of the iconic Avon Gorge, this has yet to have anchors or even permission but is in the pipeline!

DjXzeNM.name: Wild Sarah
DjXzeNM.description: epic highline project found by Kwjet and Smolda back in 2009.. leads over the valley, first 50m+ highline in Czech Republic

hqd7DFJ.name: Bukvica
hqd7DFJ.description: Well hidden place in Bohinj. There is no bypassers because there is no path directly to the place. Really great line for beginners.

E9hU9sp.name: Lucy in the Sky
E9hU9sp.description: Línea de 110 metros frente a la cascada con barrancas de fondo

kpgxAjN.name: Urzędnik
kpgxAjN.description: The biggest line of Urban Highline Festiwal in Lublin.

yYPN0Tc.name: Twister
yYPN0Tc.description: There's a twisting little river below the line and there happens a lot of twisting on the line as the spot used most often for freestyling sessions.

HqIdDN_.name: Jeździec Apokalipsy
HqIdDN_.description:
First side: 2.5m sling for main, do it longer by shackle and 5m sling to the edge. Throw 4m sling on the rock, it perfectly fit for backup. You need a lot of pads.
Second side: About 15m slings for wrap the rock on the top and few meters for backu...

JNmBVrK.name: 25m Wind Mountain Gap
JNmBVrK.description: What a spot!  Two lines, not too far from Portland with some beautiful perceived exposure, and an approach around 1 mile.  What more can you ask for?

3_Yw3o9.name: Lolo Libre
3_Yw3o9.description: It's necessary to climb the tower

2YR_g8v.name: Pavouk na káblíku
2YR_g8v.description: Permission required. Concrete pillars. Through balcony

WLtwd14.name: La mordidita
WLtwd14.description: On the side of the gate it is easy to anchor directly to the drains on the wall, for the other side a strong tree is used not so on the shore

dgaxlBK.name: (no send)
dgaxlBK.restriction: partial: We didn't manage to send it yet, so please let first riggers to do so or just come with us for a session :D

IWRRKG1.name: Highlife
IWRRKG1.description: Mellow highline/midline with views of Golden and Coors.

32DKycM.name: Castle Rock – Squid dick
32DKycM.description:
First opened in February 2015 by Zane Rowe, Shane Yates, Jacob Druce, Kaleigh Anne and Oo simo.
Castle Rock, Coromandel, New Zealand.
32DKycM.restriction: full: There is a Rahui (prohibition) on rock climbing until further notice which I would assume applies to Highlining as well

HcO31GQ.name: Nipel
HcO31GQ.description: Short line directly into the wall. Intimidating for begginers.

zr9vr_0.name: Saka Suur
zr9vr_0.description:
You camp and make a fireplace right there next to anchor. 
There is another little highline with small waterfall next to it. One side is from the tree. 
Second side(camping area) - anchor is unused electricity post which is pretty much 15m away in...

Ln0xKL6.name: Stalusa 90
Ln0xKL6.description: Nice line with some gaso below in the wild canyon of Val Russein.
Ln0xKL6.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

9mvolaY.name: Freestyle Siurana
9mvolaY.description: You can drop the tagline from the farside then walk up on the side where the two trees are close together(close side)

d_yqWzl.name: Angry Man
d_yqWzl.description: One anchor has 5 bolts and the other its a big natural anchor (9m sling) for main and backup

So0E4mS.name: Hell's line
So0E4mS.description: amazing place for highline and cimbing

iKAJodQ.name: New Horizons
iKAJodQ.restriction:
partial: Need to be activated. Contact Swiss Highline - Below 40 m
Signalisation Recquierd

3uMcnAQ.name: We Told You Sol
3uMcnAQ.description: A highline that really soaks in the sun, when there is some! right in the bowl of the Snowdon Horseshoe.

4_9Rgo0.name: Loška biba
4_9Rgo0.description: It's short, it's low, it's biba.

qZCnOqn.name: Call of the Wild
qZCnOqn.description: A highline off of the top of the Landing Strip above the Great One ski line.

c0YzE_D.name: Whakapapa Skifield – Keep cool in the Mordor
c0YzE_D.description:
Opened in November 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Whakapapa Skifield, Tongariro National Park, New Zealand.
Parking : -39.236943, 175.556267
Highline : -39.242158, 175.562157

x4xTcIQ.name: Somewhere over the rainbow
x4xTcIQ.description:
Created by Jocelin Laporte and Alexander Bonov. 1 side natural with 2 nice trees, you will need some spansets.
Other side 3x10mm and 2x12mm bolts with no hangers. 5 minutes from Zasele. Getting the line across the gap can be tricky

NwynwO_.name: Unexpected party
NwynwO_.description: First opened in 2017 by Petr Polak. We opened a new one, longer one, with the French team “Les ekiwibristes” in September 2017

rFzYSm-.name: La shunga del lago
rFzYSm-.description: 3 12mm bolts on each side. From Col de Puymorens, following Vall d'En Garcia. Parking close to the spot but difficult road

3MG9_s6.name: Swing Line
3MG9_s6.description: Originally established as the launch point for a rope swing, this has now been established as our short Waterfall Gorge highline.

ToqRep9.description: Perfect line for newbies, super easy to rig and safe. Name is Thyme.

imqB-WN.name: Wings of Desire aka Siemenslufthaken
imqB-WN.description: 2024 Slackline Berlin managed to rig this beauty, just before the renovation of the stadium started. The light masts in the east will be taken down and the line will not be repeatable.
imqB-WN.restriction: full: Permission by the stadium management is crucial.

FMDtRnF.name: First Moldavian Highline
FMDtRnF.description: 4 glued 12mm bolts on each side. Bring hangers with you

N4Q8a15.description: Rigg above the pond (it's not on the map), possible option to rigg spaceline.

zluEurk.name: 1st highline
zluEurk.description: safe place, easy setup, good for urban highline.

3vC0OH9.name: Highline to heaven
3vC0OH9.description: 35m highline at Peña de la Muela, Hidalgo.

Kcljdw9.name: FOUNTAIN OF YOUTH
Kcljdw9.description:
A beautiful highline running into waterfalls of The South Wye branch, 
Steep ascent but very rewarding. 

Dylan Bennett, Miguel Obrien,

GI5BNJZ.name: La Comunidad del Anillo
GI5BNJZ.description: Highline, second of 4 in the same Spot. New Zealand 1st and 2nd Higline Festival Spot.

UEgU8xA.name: Muito prazer, eu sou o Rio Tapajós
UEgU8xA.description: Praia Pedra da Moça, Alter do Chão/PA

jjqy9is.name: Horizon line at Wield Il- Mielah
jjqy9is.description:
With one side anchored to a big rock arch, this extensively developed climbing crag offers great views from top and below.
It's also a nice diving spot

Ilgr_ws.name: Blanca Mariposa
Ilgr_ws.description: Short line with easy anchors, one tree on one side and a zip line anchor on the other

NRJRp5L.name: Loża Szyderców
NRJRp5L.description: Access is really easy, car leave under the highline, road to the top is also easy. You should find a road (motocross road) to up no dont need to climb there.

PQd_LPq.name: MiniMet
PQd_LPq.description:
Such a fun and exposed beginner line for your first highline. we ran the line along the ground from the tension side 20 feet to the cliff, wrap and pad your line properly.
FA and established by Pat O'Brien and Steve Malkos Nov 8 2020

JYOvCjM.name: No bad days by: Jürgenstein Von Hammershmark

dHoqp51.name: Mehka žica
dHoqp51.description: Starts high then its above forest. Still great line.
dHoqp51.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien before rigging for air traffic info.

zD71B-T.name: HS 80
zD71B-T.description: OG most classic line of the spot. Tagline can be easily walked around the gap, take care not to knock loose rock onto climbers below.
zD71B-T.restriction: none: Be respectful of climbers, this is a BMC owned quarry so if the climbers complain about slackliners then it will create access issues.

yHO9xC8.name: Static Sunday
yHO9xC8.description: Top of the waltz, next to fish face

qyt3sGj.name: Spa deluxe
qyt3sGj.description: Beautifull line across the canyon, both anchors are fairly easy to reach and its pretty exposed

HiOZnF8.name: Split Pea Soup
HiOZnF8.description: Best line in the gulch, so far. Tree to tree rig with a redirect on the far anchor. Great walking distance, beautiful views of the area.

kSRhUJR.name: PLUS T'ES FORT PLUS T'ES CON
kSRhUJR.description: C'est la ligne pour débuter autour d'Annecy. Facile d'installation, elle ne fait pas peur mais reste magnifique avec une vue imprenable sur Annecy.

LpHCwAR.name: Mezmai
LpHCwAR.description: Highline  над водопадом Яворовый. Высота от 60 до 110 метров, длина 92. Первая станция организована над водопадом спомощью 4 распорных анкеров 12мм, также чуть выше есть 2 10мм анкера для страховки. Вторая станция организована на скальном выступе за 2 больших дерева, на котоый можно попасть по перешееку.

i0DsBge.name: Rim Rock
i0DsBge.description: What a line!  Escape the hot summer days in the Gorge by coming up to the mountains.  On a clear day, you can see Mt. Hood, Mr. Adams, Mt. St. Helens, AND Mt. Rainier!

_5umbCJ.name: Ask and its given
_5umbCJ.restriction: partial: In a national park where highlining isnt mentioned in the management plan yet

ew4vVp6.description: Road to Hyperborea. Extremely hard to rig highline. Not recommended for people don't have a huge alpine experience.

2yC-NoN.name: Cambio pegue por pasta al pesto

5xMf3QW.name: Serengeti 1
5xMf3QW.description: Do not rig. Bolts in bad state and are in need of replacement.

ukzcZpD.name: Bertie and Ernie
ukzcZpD.description: Beautiful exposed line with a nice view to the see on one side and an abandoned medieval village on de other side.
ukzcZpD.restriction: partial: We didn’t ask permission to the authorities but we talked to the owner of the Konoba (restaurant) and he was totally oke with it. If you want to repeat the line it’s a good idea to ask him again, especially since the line goes over a road.

sT2KCS7.name: Bachelor Party
sT2KCS7.description: Highline, fourth of 4 in the same Spot. New Zealand 1st and 2nd Higline Festival Spot. 1st send by Fer Kpok

W8B2lUF.name: CBNC
W8B2lUF.description: The line was bolted and rigged on the canceled Vitality festival 2024. CBNC (cancelled but not cancelled) Line is a 115m (lasered) line, going in front of a big cave to the other side.  With an amazing view towards the cave and also towards the city of Travnik

GOQfrTn.name: La Quemada
GOQfrTn.description: Highline rigged around 2014 by the Balance GDL community

tJ8Z6ru.name: King in my Castle
tJ8Z6ru.description: The King-Line. This Line is going above the HADA-Cave. To reach the anchors, you have to climb/hike at the far end of HADA up to the top. There should be a fixed rope, if not you can make your way if you have a little bit of experience.

nt2ZUEb.description: highline established on drill and chill festival 2016

q15wWsU.name: Mayahuel
q15wWsU.description: El lugar es el Cerro de la Campana, en el Estado de México, que también se conoce como "Salazar" entre escaladores.

7Agaa9I.name: Vojaška
7Agaa9I.description: Military have this beams to build a rope bridge sometimes. We do the same in a much cooler sense :D

-G7eSZO.name: La pêche aux champignon
-G7eSZO.description: La ligne passe d'un bous à l'autre de l'arête des oreilles du loup

PM_w1ok.name: Napoline
PM_w1ok.description:
In a natural Park of Stelvio 
Need to ask to the natural Park before rig

4qoisLu.name: Burny Burny Snap Snap
4qoisLu.description: Absolutely gorgeous line! But please DO NOT RIG!!! Healthy looking tree snapped just up the hill and would not recommend putting life in the hands of the trees there.

B21_9rg.name: Horseshoe Highline
B21_9rg.description: The perfect 'first time' highline.  Only about 40 feet (12M) and a beautiful view of the Juniata River.

UAI6Rw1.name: Голубая бездна -Golubaya Bezdna-Blue Profundity
UAI6Rw1.description: The line s above a precipice with a beautyful sea scenery. The height is from 60m to 100m (the sea level). Линия над обрывом с красивым видом на море. Высота от уровня моря около 100м, вертикальная часть около 60м. Линия проходит над вершиной сосны, которую можно подвязать к соседним деревьям, чтобы не мешалась.

jXwMhSl.name: Rosagation (Original)
jXwMhSl.description:
Remarks: To get to the anchors on the northern side you will need to do small down climb, then rappel off the boulder, take a 3m sling for the boulder and rope protection for the backup.
This line is very sheltered from winds coming from the north...

r99OazB.name: 2 million views / 2 милиона гледания
r99OazB.description: The highline is located on top of Boyana Waterfall

-4XJ7wu.name: Not Known - Adrian Spot
-4XJ7wu.description: Highline, 2 of 2 on this side of the cliff.

ky6U_hd.description: Big line over the highest drop in the quarry.

IVQjoRe.name: Remarkables, V for Vendetta
IVQjoRe.description:
Opened in January 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
The Remarkables Ski Area, Queenstown 9300, New Zealand.
GPS point of the line on topo50 : 1269518,84 5001304,92
Thanks to Cassidy knight for the pictures

a1HXzFY.name: 100m
a1HXzFY.description:
Beautiful line in the climbing crag Flône managed by KBF
Up to date access info: https://rockreservations.cmbel.be/nl/massief/highline-spontin
a1HXzFY.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members, like in Belgium KBF or CAB

nOcTsfy.name: Desfiladeiro das Catedrais
nOcTsfy.description: Via conquistada juntamente com escaladores locais (Ronaldo Franzen, Irivan, Bonga) entre a Torre dos Sinos e o cume do abrolhos, dentro do conjunto Marumbi. Faz parte da segunda via conquistada nesta montanha. A primeira foi realizada em 2009 no mesmo vale.
nOcTsfy.restriction: full: Para realizar este Highline deve-se abrir um e-protocolo (https://www.eprotocolo.pr.gov.br/) e apresentar um projeto que esteja de acordo com as normas instituidas pelo instituto Água e Terra. Além de ser o orgão que fiscaliza e autoriza qualquer projeto dentro das unidades de conservação do estado do Paraná é apenas por este meio que o projeto é viável.

GKTipAV.name: O Jah Jah
GKTipAV.description: Via de fácil acesso, e fácil montagem, bem exposta devido a sua altura, e também por ser ao lado da Cachoeira, que quando está em tempos te chuvas, pode se molhar na linha com a "nuvem" que se forma...

tZg3b-5.name: Skjer med at franskmenn kan gå på line
tZg3b-5.description: Sweet spot with quite the exposure. Be prepared for some wind and rain, you're in Lofoten.

ZOFCsyl.name: Saami
ZOFCsyl.description: First highline in Khibiny mountans bolted in 2017 and rigged in 2018. Nice 40m line in a canyon of the noname col.

ctIk3e2.description: Instead of a bridge. Line goes from the main massif to a tooth with a cross. Insanely beautiful and unique. In summer bridges are on on this place, so the only possibility to rig is offseason.

4eY6sFV.name: Harwoods Hole – Pits, nits and 10mn too late
4eY6sFV.description:
Opened in 2012 by Pedro Pimentel.
Topo by a the french highlining team : The Ekiwibrists.
Harwoods Hole, Golden Bay, New Zealand.

rLHLT52.name: Desculpa R7
rLHLT52.description:
Use treepro and ALWAYS stay clipped. An awsome line with a 55m direct exposure and 100 meter of distance
Conquered By: Vitor Luz, Ronaldinho, Vitor Martins, Gustavo Féo, Gabriel Bruno.
Our instagrams: @vt_luz, @ronaldinho_ras_r7, @mmartinsvitor, @...

cdORRKJ.name: Babakamp
cdORRKJ.description: Possibly the most scenic line in Turkey. Incredible sunset view. 4-5 lines from 40m-100m are possible
cdORRKJ.restriction: partial: Do not rig this line without contacting Babakamp. It's on the paragliding route and paragliders need to be informed.

TrDCDb3.name: Keczobokiem
TrDCDb3.description: Beautiful line, with nice exposure. Line have a big potential to epic photos.

OP-fFkB.description:
In this spot we have set up bolts for 1 line, 4 bolts on each side. there is a magnificent exposure view to the Arpi village and the Aghavnadzor valley and also there is opurtunity to rig longer or shorter lines, just need to be bolted. 
both side anchors are easy accessible (easy hiking) only on the west side rope needed to be safe while establishing the anchor.
Keep in mind that this region is very hot during summer time (+40C degree  or more), best seasons are from end of april to start of june or end of september to start of november. 
If there is some more details or help needed you can contact us, we will be happy to help or have a highline session together --> https://www.facebook.com/slackliners.of.armenia

-p7cMfS.name: Si tu te vas
-p7cMfS.description: You're in a natural parc, slackline is not allowed. Don't rig the line for long periods of time as you could get in trouble. Tree on one side, two boulders on the other (around 20m of rope needed). From Benasque go up to Refugio de Coronas and fol...

O5UvpZf.name: Ryujin Suspension Bridge Highline 350m
O5UvpZf.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

1r4phy8.name: Dobra kenja
1r4phy8.description: Easy to reach freestyle line. A bit less exposed maybe.

-p1K8IX.name: Arena
-p1K8IX.description:
the line is located over Arena sector of the Park Etgarim climbing crag.
there is a big boulder below the middle of the line
-p1K8IX.restriction: partial: requires coordination with the park management

f4u1Mtd.name: Not Known
f4u1Mtd.description: Highline, 1 of 2 on this side of the cliff.

BzFSKSG.description: La grande sœur de la 60. Ligne plein gaz en haut de la falaise du Parmelan, vue imprenable sur le lac. Encore plus magique avec une mer de nuage (automne ou hiver).

9b2Www3.name: Blackhawk Derribado
9b2Www3.description: Highline in la Cabrera, 162m line. "Blackhawk  Derribado" the highest line in la Cabrera for the moment and most exposed

2xJaeve.restriction: partial: this line has to be registered with the BAZL.

mG5E0AI.restriction: none: Slackline it's forbidden it's a natural Park

_R7r68Z.name: Ready at Dawn
_R7r68Z.description: Relatively easy rig. Beware of the brambles in event of leash fall. No fall zone is further out than expected. Anchor tree to tree. Great highline for beginners: not too exposed.

VavHT0-.name: Perłowa Wojcieszowianka
VavHT0-.description: Oba dwa stanowiska to drzewa, z jednej strony zawiesie 1.5m. z drugiej strony trzeba mieć około 10.5m zawiesi + frame. Auto parkujemy na parkingu przy drodze(nigdy nie było problemu że tam stoimy) przechodzimy mały strumyk i idziemy scieżką aż do ...

4eJSU5P.name: Bloody Frog highline
4eJSU5P.description: Short line in nice climbng area near Krakow

1ZlxzrN.name: Double YA

4Rr67C4.name: Tzatziki
4Rr67C4.description: One of the most beautiful highlines out there ;-) The point of view can almost be reached by car. From there 5min hiking to the close anchor point where we bolted in stainless M12. 4 bolts between 1m and 3m from the cliff. Take a bit of padding for the edge. The far anchor point is a bit more of a hike. Take good shoes. It's 20 min hiking. A tree 15m behind the cliff can be taken as anchor point. No bolts as the rock is shit on this side. The line is 30m off-level! Btw.: The beach can not be reached by foot. 80m repelling down on loose rocks to get to the beach - last 20m overhanging! So be careful if you plan to go down there or take a tourist ship :-p

VVE-oAH.description:
In this spot we have already set up bolts for 2 lines, 4 bolts on each side of each line. This spot is very popular and beloved by climbers as there are many rock climbing routes. The lines are not to high and not to long but it is very nice to wolk here, and the spot itself is very relaxing, as there is small river and place is very quiet, best place to relax and rest. 
The anchors on west side are easy accessible (easy hiking) but for the east side, you'll need a single climbing rope to attach to the tree and rappel down to the anchors. rope needed to be safe while establishing the anchor and also you will need rope again to havce easy descent/rappel down from the anchors after derigging. 

Keep in mind that this region is very hot during summer time (+40C degree or more), best seasons are from the end of April to start of July or middle of September to start of November usually here is windy (not too hard). 
If there is some more details or help needed you can contact us, we will be happy to help or have a highline session together --> https://www.facebook.com/slackliners.of.armenia

LYengbP.name: Fur seal line

-ZW0V2J.name: Valterline Frajola da Conceição
-ZW0V2J.description:
This is the second line ever conquered at the second largest waterfall in Brazil. The name "Valterline Frajola da Conçeição" is in honour of Val, a guy from Rio de Janeiro that we met in Vale do Capão, He got excited with the idea of climbing up the waterfall and helping us get this line done. He came along and also brought his cat who camped with us at the waterfall for five days. This line was never authorized, we had to stay hidden and work overnight to get it done before the guides could catch us in the morning, it took a couple of days because we didn´t have a driller and made the holes on the rock by hand, using a hammer. This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while travelling all over Brasil in search for Highline spots. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
-ZW0V2J.restriction:
full: The Guides of Vale do Capão for some reason hate Highline and Highliners and they are not ok with this but we still do it anyway, so if you´re interested in walking on this line and don´t mind breaking a couple of rules get in touch with us and we can set up a date :)
email: equilibrionomade@gmail.com

REUQdsv.name: Please don't right this line.
REUQdsv.description:
These bolts were placed on top of the cliff, and this goes against the local bolting ethic (trip hazard). This line is short, and not as epic as the other lines nearby, and should not be rigged. 

Access is open, but sensitive at this location. No new bolts are to be placed, but most highlines can be rigged. Be sure to evaluate the integrity of the bolts before rigging. Please read the information below. 

Kjerag is a pristine natural gem with 1000m high fjords and glacier lakes. It is a very popular tourist attraction, due to the fjords and the curiosity of Kjeragbolten, a large boulder jammed between two cliff faces. (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kjeragbolten)

Highline have been in this area since 2010 when it was opened by a group of French highliners who placed 4 lines (~20m, 22m, 23m, and 55m) in the area around the bolt (http://highlinedatabase.blogspot.com/search?q=norway) between 2010-2012. Since then, a few more lines have been added and this site is one of the most striking and well known highline areas in the world with vertical exposures of 1000m sheer drops. 

Bolting or any other permanent change to the natural landscape is illegal in Norway without express permission of the landowner or land managers and they take this very seriously. 

The first lines were bolted without permission, as the "ask forgiveness not permission" approach was more common at that time. However, in 2016, the local tourism, climbing, and conservation organizations became aware of highline bolts being placed without permission. A line was placed by Czech slackliners across the large gap in front of Kjeragbolton. With 3000 people a day hiking to the site to take a photo, this drew too much attention. 

The local organizations initially considered banning highlining in the area. The International Slackline Association worked with these organizations to maintain access in the area. 

Currently, no new lines are to be bolted at this site. The current bolts can still be used, with the exception of the bolts placed for the line behind Kjeragbolton (marked on this map for clarity but noted as off limits). 

Additionally, the ISA has had reports of rust on the bolts of the 23m line, BASEline, which was made famous in the film, I Believe I Can Fly. Be very cautious using these bolts. If anyone is motivated to replace them, please contact the ISA at info@slacklineinternational.org for more information. 

Please see the ISA post: 
http://www.slacklineinternational.org/2016/11/update-bolting-and-highlining-in-norway/

Few possibilities for length cause there are lot of wals to put the highline. From 15 to 30 metres. On picture it is about 15 metres.

Hmc4lrW.name: Come l'acqua
Hmc4lrW.description: 3 points for the mainline, 2 points for the backup in the both sides. You need long slings

zE4HfFQ.name: White Beam Dream
zE4HfFQ.description: Ridge anchor you can easily access and it has 4 bolts installed for anchoring + a series of bolts to aid access to the spot.

_2q9vzI.name: Sandgrube Grunewald
_2q9vzI.description: Not rigged yet, but scouted. More info to follow ;)

spNWSH4.name: A ty Co robiłeś w środę

Bz4wrdz.name: Highline soteska Mučevo
Bz4wrdz.description: There are 2 anchors (you need equipment for connecting 4 bolts) on both sides of canyon.

YcjVPGJ.description: easy beginner line, climbing routs and boulder around the line

9P9ccwf.name: Bire u Brot
9P9ccwf.description: Rather easy access and rather exposed highline. One anchor is reached by walking up a hiking path and anchoring to a tree at the top. The other anchor in bolted in the wall. For further topo, contact the author
9P9ccwf.restriction: partial: This highline is in a protected area, please contact the locals so you know about the restrictions, details: https://www.geo.apps.be.ch/templates/geoportal14/makepdf.php?url=https://www.geo.apps.be.ch/de/geodaten/suche-nach-geodaten/listing.html?type=layer&code=WILDRZ&mpdf=1

1QF-ulg.name: Krasotica
1QF-ulg.restriction: partial: Forbidden in the birds season. Late February to October.

6DL0iLq.name: Linha concreta
6DL0iLq.description: Classic easy line from Campinas for begginers at highline. Really easy to rig and you can use 100m line for it. If you have any doubt contact "Kong Slackline " at Facebook for more infos

f0TkZBL.name: David
f0TkZBL.description: Una linea muy expuesta y bella.

CcvjD7w.name: Tupananchiskama
CcvjD7w.description: Es una linea con su nombre en nuestro idioma natal que es el Quechua y significa "Hasta que nuestras almas se vuelvan a encontrar"
CcvjD7w.restriction: partial: Se debe pedir un permiso personal al dueño de la entrada de las siete cascadas

kqCaeA4.name: Minilodon waterfall
kqCaeA4.description: 3 spit each side. Easy ascend thanks to some ropes we put on both sides

kJ2SKdt.description: schöne line, direkt über dem Becken, des großen Wasserfalls

EJi2FaU.name: Elbrus outlook
EJi2FaU.description: Gorgeous line on the slope of mount Elbrus with a view to main Caucausus ridge. You can see mt's Ushba, Chatyn, Donguzorun and others. Height is 3100m above sea level.

DL5W6ML.name: Hours Of Operation
DL5W6ML.description:
All the info you need is here:
Access, Topos, Pictures..ect
https://docs.google.com/document/d/13jCr8XnQwt4UAovNtPMn-jGK_JxW6GCqdM59J00CedI/edit. South Side (lookout side): Main: 3x 10mm Threaded rod (take hangers and nuts), Backup: 3x Fence posts...

xYb_xwK.name: Purple gringos
xYb_xwK.description: Inquire in the mirrador restaurant for access.

B4BxoNz.description: ANy line up to this length in the quarry

bf7eL1R.name: The old road
bf7eL1R.description:
Natural anchor on the railings of the street. 
Possible from 60 - 100m, 
Direct vew on the lake!
Parking next to the line
there is also a climbing possible here check out the craig for topo

GwSA3aw.name: BUCKLE UP
GwSA3aw.description:
Dylan Bennett Hoel Yugg Miguel Obrien 

Easy access, Hard to tag, two stage tag and get a good runner to access lower part of gully. Try to tag to the true right of river to avoid it all together, can be strong. Also hard bush bashing for tagging.

g_z2Bry.name: Showboat
g_z2Bry.description: Semi-difficult to rig. The closer anchor from the approach is pretty easy to get to but the father anchor requires a little bit of bouldering skill, only one or two moves but its enough.

ooCBz5b.name: Águila Cóndor
ooCBz5b.description: This highline was 33 meters long, the main and backup is a Lift 2be (tube). It was installed in the Ojos del Salado volcano, the highest volcano in the world (6893m). The line was from the Chilean summit to the Argentinian summit, because this mountain is on the border of both countries. The height was about 20 meters and it was very near from the summit, just at 6880 meters over sea level. For each side we used 3 bolt anchors.

j7JKY43.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

Ada7glO.name: El Mostro
Ada7glO.description: Highline. Opened by Ben Gingold. 1st send by Jerome Alxiant

Jh_Pq_m.name: V morju stoji Jurca
Jh_Pq_m.description: Exposed line above waterfall in peaceful environment.

amIWoZh.name: "Highline Spot Mönch"
amIWoZh.description: Its a nice highline for beginners but you have to climb a little. On one side you will find 3 bolts and on the other side is a little nose(you can use a 4m spanset).

bpJjhul.name: Porteille d'Orgeix
bpJjhul.restriction: none: En période de chasse il faut contacter la mairie d'Orgeix pour demander.

XxEhNas.name: Mahinepua Bay – The Lone Survivor
XxEhNas.description:
First opened in October 2018 by the team Les Ekiwibristes.
Accès général
Mahinepua Bay, Northland, New Zealand.
GPS coordinates :
Parking : -34.999757, 173.843628
Highline : -34.990573, 173.854522

EB-dvgx.name: Estrellita fugaz
EB-dvgx.description: La linea mas alta de esta parte del cañon. Super linda para caminar

HDttdR4.name: Gabelhorn Highline
HDttdR4.description: The Gabelhorn highline is an alpine highline with a beatiful view. You have to climb a 5c to get on top of the higher tower.

cFZdFva.name: El Acyh
cFZdFva.description: Some nice blocks that work as anchors in one side and 3 bolts and other block to anchor. There's no other way by climbing two routes: a 5.11. and 5.7 in favor angle

vLSXauv.name: Combiner
vLSXauv.description: Spansets on the columns, without anchors. Use stairs :)

sefnHbf.name: Surfer à ceuillir les fleur
sefnHbf.description:
La ligne a été ouverte au printemps 2021 par mon frère et moi-même. Elle est relativement proche de la falaise, mais elle donne une belle vue exposée sur la vallée de la Courbière. 
Le rig est à éviter par vent de SUD 
Les 5 premiers mètres cotés tension sont en no fall zone et l’arête de la falaise à se niveaux là peut être protégé en cas de backup fall.

1jbHjvg.description: Première Highline au Taillefer. Elle surplombe le lac d'Annecy, les montagnes en toile de fond, accès facile, installation facile, le combo parfait.
1jbHjvg.restriction:
partial: Pas besoin de NOTAM pour cette ligne, mais merci d'envoyer un message à la liste de mail, au moins 2 jours avant l'installation de la ligne.

Il faudra aussi appeler les deux numéros le matin de l'installation: 

Ce mail devra contenir :
- La date d'installation et de désinstallation de la ligne 
- La commune d'installation : La Thuile
- La longueur de la ligne : 300m
- L'Altitude de la ligne : 750m
- Les coordonnées des ancrages :
Ancrage 1 : 45° 48' 30" N, 6° 11' 51" E
Ancrage 2 : 45° 48' 38" N, 6° 11' 56" E

0cg_V9t.name: The Canyon Falls Line
0cg_V9t.description: A stellar highline destination in the UP. 30' cliffs on each side of the sturgeon river accessible by a short hike from a wayside on Highway 41.

whp3uVi.name: Monika
whp3uVi.description: The more exposed line on the spot. One of best lines around this area.

7_DzLkA.name: Gardening Party
7_DzLkA.description: The Wanaka crews desparate dreams to get a 100m training line... not the most aesthetic spot, this goes overtop of the old party pit and is fully within the forest. It shoots right down the middle of this small gorge and stays reasonably close to the ground. Both anchors require a significant tree climb and there are lots of hazard trees... saying that its been a great line to practice big walks on.

svdlT1g.name: Ryujin Dam Highline 145m
svdlT1g.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

3ssthcJ.name: Pont du diable (09)
3ssthcJ.description: Highline du pont du diable, ligne évidente, qui sort de la fenêtre pour aller sur le caillou en face. Attention a la hauteur (qui varie avec l'eau en plus...)

oShZWEK.name: Skitour Highline
oShZWEK.description:
Only rigged in spring with skitour approche
Bolted Line
beautyfull view


https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZhXZNNgCapU&ab_channel=SLACKTIVITY

uWIP3mq.name: Early morning fuck
uWIP3mq.description: Very obvious line to a beautiful tree.

S6OMpgv.name: Maršal

7yMFnG_.description:
Nice quiet spot in an abandoned stone mine.
Somewhere between a hgighline and a midline, here are no fall zones if rigged loose.

Yn04zCJ.name: Mixcoatl

9A1NDkt.name: 130m Line

eby-qj2.name: Ostatnia
eby-qj2.description: Line was established 4th November 2017 by Kamil Dudek and Paweł Jarosiewicz. One of the longest highlines in the Poland at the time.

o1nU2UH.name: La terapeuta
o1nU2UH.description:
Esta es una cinta de muy fácil montaje.  Se montó por primera vez en el 2020 con Giovanni Ortiz y nos ha dado terapia a casi todos los que actualmente hacemos highline en Ecuador. Se pone o a menudo los martes y jueves en la Escuelita de slackline, que funciona desde el 2021

Hasta Enero del 2025, aproximadamente 70 deportistas, principalmente de Colombia, Ecuador e Italia han podido entrenar aquí.

M4ue0VW.name: Skippers Canyon, For a good time text Danielle
M4ue0VW.description:
Opened in January 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Skippers Canyon, Queenstown 9300, New Zealand.

Gbr_LLE.name: 17m  Saussois
Gbr_LLE.description:
5 broches par coté, 3 points pour la force (devant), et deux points pour le backup (derrière).
Prévoir élingues de 3m et 2m par cotés. Se garer au sommet des falaises, sur le petit parking prévu pour les randonneurs et grimpeurs.
La ligne se situe...

h9Vg4lm.description: Nice exposed line at the city. It cannot be rigged without official permissions
h9Vg4lm.restriction: full: Super exposed to public. You will be stopped in 10 mins by police. Do not rig without permissions. Impossbile

K2-upOr.name: The Duck (Short)
K2-upOr.description: This is the version of The Duck rigged between the two bolted anchors instead of threading the old crane base. It is shorter and has sketchy fallzones. Not recomended.

mMlvjCc.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members, like in Belgium KBF or CAB

Nice tree to tree line in a protected natural area. Easy to rig. Too hot during the summer. 
// Hezká, relativně vysoká a lehce natažitelná lajna. Jde tahat v pohodě bez drona i bez repky (dokud bude dole paseka). U bodu 2 je hezký felící plácek na ostrohu. Nejlepší přístup je od SV přes louku s krávama. Nedoporučuju v létě, kdy se vyprahlé údolí změní v horkovzdušnou troubu.

Par Delphin & Florian

Fun easy line with probably easiest approach ever!! Rigged solo, the hardest part of this rig is getting a tag line across, other then that easy as!!
Pretty cool rig as it’s rigged next the coastal road and those driving past have no idea you’re there. Checkout the Surf while you’re there and don park on the road there’s a pull over spot 20m back

DAVE6ZM.description: Legs 1 and 2 of a spaceline that could be rigged as it's own highline

UQZykSM.name: Leigh Way
UQZykSM.description:
Two parallel higher 80m lines can be rigged here. 

Not self explanatory so would be best to rig with someone who knows the spot (Bristol Slackline groups are pretty active).

The narrow more open side has a holm oak you can rig to further behind the ridge. Extended anchor that requires a frame/hang frame. 

The shadier side is two large yew trees you can equalise between (also requires a deviation or a-frame to raise the anchor).
UQZykSM.restriction: partial: We have never required permission thus far .. it's been three years of rigging and leaving permarigs without any issues.

ayz2xXQ.name: Bobby La Brume
ayz2xXQ.description:
10mm spit already in place. (Master 3 on each side +  1 backup)
3m & 4m lifting sling. Parking : col d'Azet
Access east side : need 30m rope
Access west side : need 15m rope

SugtrYL.name: Ghostbuster
SugtrYL.description: We used mms. 4 bolts in each side. Car nearby the spot

khZy4QI.description: Anchor on the new anchors on each side. Edge protection needed.

zAnOVtC.name: Sosedova
zAnOVtC.description: Longest line here. One side is great and exposed with a blank rock underneath.

-ayKexJ.name: Osiemdziesiątka
-ayKexJ.description: This is a private area. If you have questions, ask Urban Highline Festival.

q08cArY.name: The Gathering of Tribes
q08cArY.description:
Highline stablished on 07/03/2021 by Paulo Henrique (PH), Saulo B., Leandro B., Doilson J., Francisco C., Priscila A., Frank A. and Yana H.
Spot location:
Jornalista Phelippe Daou Bridge, better known as Ponte Rio Negro, connecting the cities of Manaus and Iranduba.
The spot has been known and frequented by the local climbing community for years, which seted up the climbing routes on the first two columns (on the Manaus side). The highline connects these two columns. Our gratitude to the climbing community. Doubts you can contact @le.psy92 or @saulo.balieiro

CFT0ArW.name: Narebrnica
CFT0ArW.description: Long line with beautiful 360 view. A little low but worth it. Use short segments!
CFT0ArW.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien before rigging for air traffic info.

f2abD6B.name: Saint Antonin - 60m
f2abD6B.description: Highline de 60m qui met bien dans l'ambiance malgré la hauteur.

k8YrxPc.name: China Man Gap
k8YrxPc.description:
A new addition to the Windy Point highlines.
60m long and classic, this highline's perceived exposure is similar to the Old Man Gap and offers a breathtaking view of Mt. Lemmon. Conditions will either be perfect or very windy.
This is an ideal trick/freestyle highline, so get ready to huck yo meat.
Incredibly easy approach from Windy Point Vista (10 min.) so expect occasionally onlookers and climbers!
It has been rigged solo, and really easily rigged with 2 people.
Established by James Xu.

cix2FeN.description: Roughly 150-155m line on the south side of the 303. Access is easiest from the freeway if you pull off the side of the road on 51st it is not marked so look for the power lines branching off to the south.

E2B65Vg.name: Return of the Jedi
E2B65Vg.description: Access is really easy, car leave under the highline, road to the top is also easy. You should find a road (motocross road) to up no dont need to climb there.

D8RH94H.name: Thorns
D8RH94H.description: Asops river gorge place with unlimited highline options

P6E8cR3.name: Mazatzin
P6E8cR3.description: 245m highline at Peña de la Muela, Hidalgo.

8pDyHW8.name: Punto de quiebre
8pDyHW8.description: Great 39m highline at Peña de la Muela, Hidalgo.

Tliqg6j.name: Trollsnørr
Tliqg6j.description: Contact gravdal.martin@gmail.com for picture and info. Maybe I´ll join. Natural anchors. Have to be creative with the anchors. Some trees and cliff edges. contact Martin Gravdal for pictures of rigging example. Just a few meters from parking ;)

UkqcL7A.name: Marins
UkqcL7A.description:
This highline is located between two private properties so we recommend that you keep in touch with the owners of base A whose name is Mateus.
It is recommended to bring water.

As for mounting, this highline is very easy to access both anchors. Anchor "A" (PHOTO) can be reached by car, and on side "B" you have to cross the river and follow into the closed forest until you find the exact opening inside the forest. Track marked.
Extra attention in mounting and dismounting, Has climbing routes in place!

SZZdMfy.name: Por da Chuva
SZZdMfy.description: Uma linha perfeita para iniciantes, entrada fácil altura media.

m0sv90a.description: Ligne plein gaz en haut de la falaise du Parmelan, vue imprenable sur le lac. Encore plus magique avec une mer de nuage (automne ou hiver).

QIrEE7j.description: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune)

nFxy_3b.description: Macaroni. The most popular line in Crimea. Absolutely must to try. Brilliant.

NNhBnqa.name: Nadge highline
NNhBnqa.description:
road close.
crossing the river on the cable (photo)
Base Camp at the foot of the mountain
a steep climb up the hill from the camp 500 meters.

a9TBw5b.name: Linha do Pinóquio
a9TBw5b.description: This line can be rigged just in the dry season, as the left anchors stays under water when the river is high. Best time April to September

_uqoLhD.name: Ave-some
_uqoLhD.description: Nice place with really pleasing exposure.

2ND7v9w.name: Deje los pernos
2ND7v9w.description: Frim a hill to a pinacle, nice expo, teide view if you're lucky

toCsP62.name: Jake's Peak / Emerald Point Highline
toCsP62.description: Bolt garden both sides. 2000' vertical climb in less than a 1 mile. Brutal approach. Well worth it

wkqWhPZ.name: The Cornwall Line
wkqWhPZ.description: The most well known highline in the area

c5gZylU.name: Norteño Amor
c5gZylU.description: Linea muy expuesta. Una experiencia inolvidable si te atreves.

bDVemtw.name: Lazy Daisy
bDVemtw.description: Nice line, start from a pillar. We made there also a spaceline!

3WfsBvu.name: Miting lajna
3WfsBvu.restriction: partial: Only with permission of the person who live beneath it.

Bm4kE2f.name: el mostro
Bm4kE2f.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

yjxKJ_X.name: Youpiline
yjxKJ_X.description:
petite highline idéal pour débuter...
15m de long pour 80 à 100m d'expo ! Le site est magnifique et malgré cette petite distance à traversé la ligne est majeure.

mEWUTye.name: Turkey-poult
mEWUTye.description: Newbie's line. Easy to get and easy to rig.

AQ8EmfX.name: Saving Nuri
AQ8EmfX.description: Risky line to rig because they release the water of the dam and the valley floods while rigging if timed bad.

dnimpRx.name: Waterline Verticale
dnimpRx.description: Depuis le sentier d'accès, la ligne va droit dans la cascade. Attention l'accès à l'ancrage dans la cascade demande un peu de grimpouille facile mais très expo et improtégeable: le caillou part en miettes. 25m plus haut,  il y a une petite vire et l'ancrage est bien à droite sur celle-ci, au seul endroit avec du bon rocher.

vTD0-m4.name: The longest 6a
vTD0-m4.description: Very pretty line over crystalblue water in a rather secluded bay with climbing crags on both sides of the bay. We rigged a 195m line because we only had a 200m setup but there are many more parallel 200m plus lines possible. Since the approach to the anchors is difficult I advise to rig this line with at least 3 and preferably 4 people.
vTD0-m4.restriction: partial: We asked the owners of the guesthouse ‘Bepin’  if they were oke with us rigging there. They were oke with it and were very welcoming. They also allowed us to sleep in our van on their parking lot since the camping was closed. Please ask them again for permission if you want to repeat the line.

MmiR0cf.name: Tucson Chainsaw Massacre
MmiR0cf.description:
A beautiful Line over Marshall Gulch
FA: Jep Stockmans 10/21

eKUFWn-.name: Naked Instinct
eKUFWn-.description: This line is all natural, and has relatively short no-fall zones. It's an all-natural rig, and it's fairly level. It's in the strong sunlight all day, so the waterfall makes it very refreshing. This area gets very dry in the summer and fall, though, so it is much nicer to visit in the spring when the waterfall is flowing. The Stanislaus river is about 200 meters away and runs all year.

sCfLJX0.description: Expedition highline in a heart of Caucasus mountains. Altitude is about 2600m.

CjR-IQ2.name: HS 70 (the freestyle line)
CjR-IQ2.description:
A (relatively) newer line using the from the east side of the 80m to the west side of the 40m. For meets with multiple lines this is generally RESERVED for freestyle 😉. CAUTION - no fall zone near the east anchor due to close rocks on the north side.
Tagline can be easily walked around.
CjR-IQ2.restriction: none: Be respectful of climbers, this is a BMC owned quarry so if the climbers complain about slackliners then it will create access issues.

mpJo-sl.name: Hangman
mpJo-sl.description: Single tree anchors on both sides. Both sides the tree is set back so static rope and A-frames is best.

34PRIVY.description: Horizon. Stunning line, with a panoramic view of the sea.

lt1TSXc.name: Freestyle ON THE CAVE
lt1TSXc.description:
This is one of the three lines that have been conquered in this location and the first and only for freestyle. This is a beautiful place in Chapada Diamantina Bahia anda its open for visitors. Two of the lines at this spot were conquered by me and my partner while traveling all over Brasil in search for spots to put up the most incredible Highlines. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.

Wk9AInu.name: Ho aus dem Häuschen
Wk9AInu.description: Wall of fame for those who made it :). Bolts in the wall of Ho's room and a tree

xJiuS58.name: Mars

151sfS9.name: Oak Newton Park Longline
151sfS9.description: An easy-to-rig longline with strong tree anchors. There is a broad, low bulge right in the center of the line, which means the line will bottom out sooner than later. There aren't many options for rigging the line higher that are safe for the tree, so height is limited to about 2.3 meters at one of the anchors, and 3.3 at the other. Police have never given us trouble here, and the residents are usually happy to watch. There are a couple of residents that let their dogs shit everywhere in this park, so watch out.

9PL26UW.description: If you are blocking public works from mowing the grass or anything, please derig to preserve access! There is also football, baseball and rugby practice here occasionally, they have priority over the field. We used to get kicked out of here all the time, now it is city approved!

HII5Fm0.name: Landungssteg
HII5Fm0.description: You can rig 4 lines in this park. 2 small ones, a 40m and an 80m line. The longer lines have a little natural sag (0.7m), which makes them absolutely fantastic to walk. The park is usually very very busy, so you can only slackline in the early hours or on cloudy days. Slacklining is allowed here (approved by the mayor himself), however, noone is really doing it, so people don't know what you are doing. Be aware of bystanders and kids. There is a restaurant right next to the park. Be sure to order a coffee there! The pasta is also great.

There is also football, baseball and rugby practice here occasionally, they have priority over the field. We used to get kicked out of here all the time, now it is city approved!

VQl7xTy.name: Calcifers sprinterim
VQl7xTy.description: Decent trees for climbing though bushy higher up, nonetheless a great sandy spot full of sag for plenty of fun tricks, bounces and challengew

utiLEog.name: Ankle Philosophy
utiLEog.description:
There is a big tree just in the corner that you can see on map picture. Use it with protection 

The material you would need it is longlines basics, pulley system, 3 meters slings preferred, shackles..

The weather is hard so use a hat or cap

ZW06lxq.name: Clausthaler Südseestrand
ZW06lxq.description:
Trees, 3m slings needed. Parking lot near by.
2024 - when the weather is good there are quite some people. The lines described is over a path so be aware of that. Cyclists passing over it. The other line is above some bushes so only partially walkable. It's possible to rig a rodeo line / shorterline (see photo) and enjoy swimming :)

j_3g61g.name: Parc des Loges
j_3g61g.description:
This spot is quite good to rig a 75m line (245ft) because it is some kind of a bowl-shaped grass ground. It is easy to access: a bus stops just across. 
Surprisingly, there are not many people on this part of the park, so you could have slackline sessions without a big crowd watching you. Plus, the view of the Carrefour market worth the try !

uIa5lSJ.description: There is a bank close to the North anchor creating a falling hazard if you try to walk the full line

V6spvdt.description: Shorter of the two lines over the dip

MBv99wh.name: Stade de ergue Armel
MBv99wh.description: La zone peut être occupé par des footeu mais sinon on peut tendre une grande ligne et peut être plusieurs petites en faisant les angles

R-snlbR.name: Ezio Longline
R-snlbR.description: Nice longline in the park, a little bit of a dip but not really enough to make a difference in tension.

O1En-pK.description: Na środku polany jest wgłębienie terenu dltego nie trzeba wysoko wieszać taśm na stanowiskach. Park Skaryszewski

North side was a little high at high tension; careful of the movable concrete bricks. I used a 60m and had to extend both anchors a couple feet each. 
Fun line, got attention from the kids :)

R97ddee.description: The park has some slightly hilly terrain and can be used for longlining quite well. Add each spot if you have rigged here, I have only been here sporadically

A6cEZxV.description: Right by the cannon, can't miss it!

xTGC1FS.description: Boitier électrique accroché à un des deux arbres, pratique pour brancher une sono ou les portables

SU6915P.name: Dune Years Eve

H3goPE3.description: Nice dip only 2/3 of the way are you high off the ground.

eFTLiSX.name: de broer van het beest

Send a message to me when you want to slackline here:
+31 6 15595439

I got stopped from a council guy once saying I couldn't but out of many many times.
Plenty of options for shorter lines as well in the same spot. Let's gather there!

K4NgRFn.description: Line established at drill and chill festival 2017

Surprisingly, there are not many people on this part of the park, so you could have slackline sessions without a big crowd watching you.

lsGUkVb.description:
max long line 90-100m

x7Xac2A.description: It's a large field where you can find different configurations for rigging. You can set here a 105m line (345ft). It's a quiet spot and the Tachen pub is very close to it (if somehow beverages are needed..).

io7IzW5.name: Kareivukai

_eaLZGK.name: Duo is watching
_eaLZGK.description: 60 meter midline over a pond in a park. The line has a beautiful view on the duo building.

QkXa-s-.description: While not much different than the Feta Cheese line, it does however provide more space between the line and the central tree. While walking the tag line lookout for the fallen tree that is cut halfway though! While clearing some brush after finding the line, the tree was mostly cut through and then abandoned because of being ti ti.

23Cr8as.name: CoronaMid
23Cr8as.description: Natural anchors on trees. By feet, and leader would help

g4Nki-o.name: The big dream came true
g4Nki-o.description: Nice training Spot in Seih sou forest in Thesaloniki. Easy accesible by car or by foot. Place offers midline from 15m to around 50m long. Nearby there is water spring.

8Ln1xU3.name: Midline sfinge

lxKqcwK.name: Saimaa Dreaming
lxKqcwK.description: Nice water midline spot,  not far away from Lappeenranta city centrum.  Only bad thing in daytime is traffic noise from the road next to the spot. And remember to watch out those high sailing boats. We were camping in the same spot and It's legal to stay there few days,  If you stay longer I think it's not a problem :)  There's a lots of space to park a car just next to the line. I'm living in Lappeenranta and you can reach me from number +358456346079 if you need some information or help :)  Markus.

LvxU5no.name: JackFruit and Tofu
LvxU5no.description:
Southernmost Midline In the Continental US! 

Access is pretty good but you do pass a “no trespassing” sign when getting close to the line. Park at the mountain biking trailhead and walk along the main mountain biking trail until you see an opening on the left. Walk across the small land bridge into a large canopy opening.

LlvwWPm.name: plan B
LlvwWPm.description: several lines are possible all over the longer bridge to the middle of the short one, if you rig from top it will be harder to set up but you gain about 3m. of height. if you rig longer than 100m you should go up or rig something with super low stretch the shortest is 100m. longest is about 140m.

qcNGoYk.name: Zufall
qcNGoYk.description: Found the line by accident. Long an nice midline to dip a little bit into the lake. The spot is quite obvious.

BBQ5kMK.name: 70m
BBQ5kMK.description: Easy rig highlines in a forest, there are mulitiple lines to rig here and we have permission to go here from Stadt Zurich

LikjE_q.name: Super High Enough
LikjE_q.description: Highlining over or near Hidden Beach. Park on the side of CR 550, follow trail to the lake shore. 5 minute approach.

4W0AehT.name: Carlos Sampaio
4W0AehT.description: Climb up the trees to get a safe height. Trees

O0pNyAU.name: Ljubljanica midline
O0pNyAU.description: City center midline. Sometimes rigged by slackliners for a lot of attention. Boats are constantly driving underneath and you should be careful not to fall.

VsuMO7W.name: Mam Ser

trk1nov.name: El Tendido Secreto

zGo5UjH.name: 2long2low
zGo5UjH.description: Pretty much the longest line in the Hollow (for now)..

USPyxBh.description: All lines in this cove must be rigged natural. Both of the anchors are boulder wraps. Static anchor requires a 10' spanset. The tensioning anchor requires 40' of static rope

PbYYIwM.name: Midline Belle Époque
PbYYIwM.description:
Midline established on 07/18/2020 by the team: Leandro Barroncas, Beatriz, Doilson, Priscila Almeida, Yana, Luan, Shox, Estevão and Maria.
Spot location: Parque Residencial Mestre Chico, Ponte 07 de Setembro, downtown Manaus district.
The spot is located on the promenade of a public park. When we set up the line, there were no impediments by third parties. However, as the place is a public space, there may eventually be inspection by the city hall or the military police. In this case, the dialogue for the authorization of the sport must be emphasized.
Any questions, you can contact via facebook or instagram: Leandro Barroncas.

Midline aberto no dia 18/07/2020 pelo time: Leandro Barroncas, Beatriz, Doilson, Priscila Almeida, Yana, Luan, Shox, Estevão e Maria.
Localização do pico: Parque Residencial Mestre Chico, Ponte 07 de setembro, bairro Centro de Manaus. 
O pico localiza-se no passeio de um parque público. Na ocasião em que abrimos a linha, não houve impedimentos por terceiros. Porém, como o lugar é um espaço público, eventualmente pode haver fiscalização pela prefeitura ou polícia militar. Nesse caso, deve-se frisar o diálogo para a autorização da prática do esporte.
Quaisquer dúvidas, pode contatar via facebook ou instagram: Leandro Barroncas.

-E5pl3J.description:
max long line 90-100m   
possible to built a Rodeo

B1V-CMC.name: Conkouati line
B1V-CMC.description: Little midline in the conkouati national park

O2_5t4X.description: Tidal. Large docking bollards. The fences have been used as A frames

xUjCCVa.name: Pantagana
xUjCCVa.description: It's a small bay with 7 Sommer houses. The locals tolerated me. Some houses are for rent. It's easy to make the tagline connection and rigging.

LgP5OST.name: Teerhofbrücke
LgP5OST.description:
Great line for beginners, easy rig. Tie in while standing behind the railing, then slide out. 
Possibly restricted. The buildings are private property and the security guard wasn't quite sure how to handle us during our first rig. he let us be in the end though. 
Dependent on water level, high tide might just get your feet wet, otherwise super fine. 
Very visible, you will have a ton of people watching you, the bridge is quite frequented.
Length can vary as you can rig farther back or closer to the bridge. Everything from 30 - 60m should be possible.

AH7V-NJ.name: Midline auf dem Sand
AH7V-NJ.description: Small midline across a creek. Be careful, the ground is not very secure. Don't rig the trees right at the edge. The tensioning side tree is on a plateau. Tight backup necessary!!

ajg_laQ.name: Ere's Line
ajg_laQ.description: Rigged once and unlikely to ever be rigged again. Not high enough to recommend trying safely. For a better line check out the line "Scenikc" just next to this one.
ajg_laQ.restriction: partial: This spot is a retired water reservoir and a premier graffiti destination. The gates are locked but often the locks are broken, be mindful of the unhoused folks & tweakers that wander in.

kunI5kE.name: Grünes Wohnzimmer
kunI5kE.description:
OMG is this place beautiful.
peacefully and complete in the woods you can set up a awesome 55m line. surrounded by birds singing for you, you can enjoy this lovely line

qyGplbi.name: Fantômas
qyGplbi.description:
Nice midline over a small waterfall.
Possibility to put other lines between 15m and 35m.

mBpiI_u.description: longer version. if loose, you whip in to the water. quite fun.

For one lock you have to enter into fotino . To made this you Climb wall and enter in the structure .

This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while traveling all over Brasil in search for spots to put up the most incredible Highlines.  If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in Bahia, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.

uDpm0mO.description: It's near to the Golfcamp, close to an abandoned house, it's hidden but prefere don't be to loud,

gi7d9af.name: Smooth As Silk
gi7d9af.description:
12mm hangars and bolts required. Bolts placed in solid rock faces a few metres back from exposure, below level of line. On last rig, eyelets were placed and used to rig tensioning system. Line must be rigged tight to avoid decking out in the event of gear failure. Double webbing recommended. 
Easy access to both sides of exposure, long haul up steep hill to the spot, flat ground for camping either side. Beware of loose rock and harsh weather conditions; the spot is an old quarry littered with boulders and loose rock, and is very open to the elements.
The spot is technically on private land, but due to high level of climbing activity in the area, no known problems have been raised by the landowners. Spot is used locally by dirtbike motorcross riders.

gpdARmy.name: Ibergerslack
gpdARmy.description: In the middle of a climbing area chli scheien, reachable in 20min from the Ibergeregg pass where you can park.

8YwKg0r.name: Mark of Zoro

otMlfIl.description:
Super easy line. 10 minutes from the Sleepy Bay car park. Amazing rock. Nice place to spend a rest day.
3 10mm bolts each side, no hangers.
The left side (closer o the car park) requires abseiling ~15m rope. Use a massive stone on top as natural anchor for this.
Easy access to the right side.
Crew: Stepan Novikov, Alexandra Boogdanova

3jp7ukq.name: Rainline

At the other side there are multiples boulders too to create your anchor

Les ancrages sont full naturel.
En bonus du psycobloc de folie tout le long des rochers (sans oursins).

Ligne ouverte à deux avec Barbara Baugé ❤️
