partial: La côte est fragile donc les glissements de terrains peuvent apparaître...
Des panneaux interdisant les poids lourd à ce zone sont présents dans le village avant le spot !

YQ2Ui_u.name: Umberto un Po
YQ2Ui_u.description: Line crossing the entire Po river, anchored to trees. It is important to kwon that it's forbidden to rig it without municipal, fluvial and park permission.

twPV9T3.name: Hollywood midline
twPV9T3.description: Called the Hollywood midline for its off the road access. Park right off highway 145 and walk to the base of the two closest big pine trees. The branches have already been cleared at the height to rig at(and we have been asked to not do this to any other trees). Relatively easy to spot the trees due to the cleared out spots 25-30' up.

tlHzpIR.name: Tut's Towers
tlHzpIR.description: 93' Bring your edge pro! I use at least one crash pad on each side. 5.8ish solo climb the tower. Area has lots of glass and trash so please don't make it worse! Classic midline in Flagstaff! Light the fires at night for a good time!!

z1Bpyl7.description: The line is tidal and can be 4m off the water in high tides. Big docking bollards on either side

qMthERo.name: Märchensee
qMthERo.description: Midline across an old quarry. Not very high, but great scenery. The original name is pink pussy....

GOgHx-J.name: Praiera
GOgHx-J.description: Giovanne conquered this line many years ago and comes back almost every year to put on something diferent for the audience of turists at the beach. This is a very crowded beach in Itacaré, every summer its loaded and we´ve done all kinds of presentations on this line including acrobatics on colorful fabric.

fLrfG7u.name: Che Guevara
fLrfG7u.description: Midline, easy to install and walk

hqrPYlS.name: Rodont 1
hqrPYlS.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

CQdtZm-.name: Urban Delight
CQdtZm-.description: 50m Midline in the woods. nice to play, easy to walk, no exposure

UnAW1i4.name: Sontaran Spire
UnAW1i4.description: Hound Tor spire line, easy rig but really low..

lsv30Lc.description: Only rig on Sundays as there is no police ;) easy to set up (tree anchors) ..use a static rope or line backup and keep it fairly tight as it is not very high for this length of line (post on fb in STRASLINE or Slack Alsace for people to rig and walk with)

wIDzr_J.description: Easy acses ,its a good DWS climbing area

HAZY6x-.name: Neverland
HAZY6x-.description: Very colorful spot with flowery valley beneath. Not very high and one of the anchors is high up in the pine tree, which shakes quite a bit even with catching the line during falls. Not suitable for anything excessively dynamic. Leashfalls seem very close to the ground, but are not exactly - impression is given by very high flower (up to 3m tall) vegetation and bushes - which is the reason for the name.

khunGRN.description:
For one lock you have to enter into fotino . To made this you Climb wall and enter in the structure .
On the other side you climb a three

PNaU3-Z.name: Tramway
PNaU3-Z.description: Super fun line under the Sandia peak Tramway

qSDfpfv.name: Wychel Midline
qSDfpfv.description: In the midle of the line it hafe a bench in the falling line, therefore you need an spotter to support you

RVwnnCf.description: Tidal. Large docking bollards. The fences have been used as A frames

8c7V0Ci.name: Charlie's Lline
8c7V0Ci.description: 20m line, bolted as a beginner-friendly line. Beautiful ocean and sunset views.

OU7KnUZ.name: Your balls
OU7KnUZ.description: the walk zone is not 60m but you will need webbing for the no fall zones

Ka5kh45.name: Pinching the Crown Jewels
Ka5kh45.description: Walk along the coast to the left of the jetty and continue around across the rocks and up the little goat trail until you get to the cove

CnQN23G.name: WestWood
CnQN23G.description: Park at Parkinglot "Malberg", follow the way eastwards for 5 Minutes - you'll find the old quarry on the left. Go up a vague path right of the quarry to reach the first anchor-point. The line is on the "upper part" of the quarry

WPBpqxZ.name: Nevasca, midline ciro
WPBpqxZ.description: A linha nevasca é o midline no complexo esportivo ciro nardi

f1XT3d6.name: Low and Long
f1XT3d6.description:
never installed, but sure possible
the rock is not the best, we have to test it if we can use regular bolts,
an other option would be natural anchors or a dead man anchor,
please check out the sport first

NMSlYnR.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you turn right Sector 2

qf2I4rG.name: Refous original
qf2I4rG.description: Midline, amateur easy to install and walk

8wnHEF8.name: Deep Quarry Midline
8wnHEF8.description:
Climbing guides say this line is about 15m high but that seems too high, nice walked towards tree's or you can face a quarry wall.
Easily rigged in an hour or so..

yKmtO_V.name: Downtown Midline
yKmtO_V.description: 40 ft above the ground on some old train tracks surrounded by abandoned buildings. Cool urban midline spot with the view of the arch in the background.

XY6mD0E.name: La commessura
XY6mD0E.description: Natural anchor on one side and three bolts (bring 10mm plates) on the opposite anchor; I did master point with these three bolts and I put the backup behind, on a climbing rest

rCwl9Pv.name: Varques
rCwl9Pv.description: At the big cave, on the flat spots on each side

3seIKiQ.description: Lots of good trees for anchors

4R-PnsJ.name: BZ Slack
4R-PnsJ.description: contact use on FB for real data

d-F92CC.name: Four-
d-F92CC.description: A lot of mountains all around, beautiful place to put a midline.

NruLjNp.name: Budders
NruLjNp.description:
Named after one of the best dogs in mammoth. One side wraps boulders the other is a tree.
Bring a good size spanset and some rope (12 footer and at least 60’) for the rock wrapping. Best access is by boat

dLtMv3V.name: Ms Perfect
dLtMv3V.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

Zp7o-8-.name: Rodont 2
Zp7o-8-.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

-sY4R2K.name: Beginners Luck
-sY4R2K.description: Easy to rig line 25m from the carpark

GvPImIc.name: En la tranquilidad de la naturaleza

pQd-BCm.name: Kalamatianos
pQd-BCm.description: Training midline in Kalamata. Nearby there is church with spring. I get there by a van.

Ps3HwDi.name: Afterlife
Ps3HwDi.description: New line spot in this area. First time tensioning there was quite an enchanting view of three yearly seasons at once - Autumn, Winter and Spring. And then again there is a graveyard closely and even a bus stop named accordingly, so these mystical circumstances led to current name of the spot.

adRwiZw.name: Žaltys
adRwiZw.description: Named after Adder (grass-snake) seen at the other side water front.

6rLV1e2.name: Midline / waterline (à ouvrir,) seulement à un marée haute

7j0rW6S.name: El Parque
7j0rW6S.description: Sobre lago artificial y una isla de patos.

_z7O3AR.description:
For one lock you have to enter into fotino . To made this you Climb wall and enter in the structure .
On the other side you climb a three

QCVXx6Z.description:
For details contact Andrei or Matei from Slacksylvania
 slacksylvania@gmail.com or on fb https://www.facebook.com/slacksylvania/

xItmNV7.name: Sopro do Dragão
xItmNV7.description: 4 pinos ancoragem química na rocha em cada lado. Dispensa conectores nestes. Acesso pela trilha que da acesso a praia do gravatá

kJKQSqR.name: “Bred Fecky”
kJKQSqR.description: Amazing 150 meter line at the top of Castle rock

1wdXXwC.name: Stour Power
1wdXXwC.description: Midline over the river Stour. Rigged off the ruins of an old bridge. Please contact the farmer before rigging to gain access to the west side of the bridge. see extra notes.

B2f6UBt.name: Chladný špek
B2f6UBt.description: One unused railway bridge, and another former road bridge now used only by pedestrians and cyclists. Next to the unused railway bridge is an active one, still occasionally used by trains.

tFLRqmN.name: melezza 1
tFLRqmN.description: Low midline, to use with intermittent connections only and if you know about the risks. very simple rig.

w5aXcau.name: Spiaggia di Testue
w5aXcau.description: There are bolts on one side, in the other need 10mm platelets. Simply walking

up4Aa6W.name: Skimmer
up4Aa6W.description: Fifth established line spot at this lake. Since it's longer and opposite shore anchor is lower it is not that high. With low tension you'd probably skim the water surface on this one. And since some dragonfly species are named 'skimmer' - it was chosen as one for this line as well to be consistent :)

stBoEoX.name: Eucascadinha
stBoEoX.description: Middle line between two heath tree

nKwaZPF.name: Lai da Marmorera
nKwaZPF.description: Sketchy but nice and easy long midline at the dam. You don‘t touch the ground while falling at the most parts of the line.
nKwaZPF.restriction: none: This line is below 25m in hight and doesn‘t need to be annouced at BAZL.

C-K_zBG.description: Midline above water, between a bridge and a tree. On the tree, we rigged to an inclined branch that needs backing up to the main trunk.

j8hP_rc.name: Non-GMO Organic Free Range Feta Cheese
j8hP_rc.description: A great 50m line with decent walking distance. Large tree in the middle splitting the line with a no fall zone.

BmW1Tve.name: Hounds of Hundatora
BmW1Tve.description: Longer and higher than the spire but a similar rig, padding needed

Pxep9HO.description: very nice and long water- midline
Pxep9HO.restriction: full: same with all other lines at the lake

T7WZPNk.name: C-Trainings line
T7WZPNk.description: easy rig, high enough for the backup to engage, nice chill spot... what do you want more?

KTkM8yo.name: Spilonca midline
KTkM8yo.description:
Chill spot over river
Many posibilities between 50 and 100m . 
Complicated rigging, on small trees.
Nice parking is close by.
Spot is windy.

AEM7_GQ.name: The Emergency Room
AEM7_GQ.description: The first of lines to ever be established in the area. First Rig crew: Alonso Rodriguez, Makynzee Balucas, Leon Aledo. Great line even though it's a little bit off level by maybe 2-4 feet. The line was first rigged on February 18, 2018. This line is to be updated with bolts on the static side. (See rigging for details on this) Please have fun and let me (Alonso) know if you plan on rigging this so that I can join! :)

A-Wp7F3.name: Terminus de la Voiselle
A-Wp7F3.description: Quand on arrive au centre Nautique (piscine de Bourges) 200m à gauche

a-nwGE9.description: A big line in a beautiful spot.  Hike around to the back side of the butte and rig on natural anchors.  This line has a view of Mt. Hood and the river.

MJ9Oylb.name: Crack
MJ9Oylb.description: Midline through the ravine. Tree stations.

82S_ebP.name: Euthanasia
82S_ebP.description: Very colorful spot with flowery valley beneath. Not very high and one of the anchors is high up in pine tree, which shakes quite a bit even with catching the line during falls. Hence the name for it - also because of pet care facility nearby. Not suitable for anything excessively dynamic.

piXd2Fe.description: Get ready for a wet whipper if you leash in here

9_6HCyW.name: Jesmond Dream
9_6HCyW.description: Restricted access. Contact a member of Northumbria Slackline Society for info

yLs3b2P.name: Baby
yLs3b2P.description: 3 points for the mainline, 2 points for the backup in the both sides. You need long slings

pHAf-Lk.name: Homestake
pHAf-Lk.restriction: none: Forest Service is aware of the line and has no problem with it as long as it isn't left perma-rigged.

zay5HNF.name: Low tide
zay5HNF.description: The line is not in the exact spot, It's in the Avery drive climbing area on top of JB trout to the opposing wall

vXh8oRH.name: Dora la Exploradora
vXh8oRH.description: tree anchors, the line can be passed through the bridge. The line is not very high (around 8/9m depending on the height of the anchors) and the water is not deep (and clean) enough to allow waterlining. In other spots over the river the police made derig the line, but it has never happened here because it's a bit more hidden.

uwuzNHo.name: Embracab
uwuzNHo.description: In front of the sea, carefull if there is big wave and inshore wind you will be wet !

6YY0_LS.name: On ne cours pas à côté de la piscine !

S0OQllT.name: Copse Corridor
S0OQllT.description: A longer variation of Sugar Snap 60; threads the perfect corridor of trees. Can be rigged at the same time as Sugar Snap 60.

W7JX0e0.name: Shorty
W7JX0e0.description: Easy line to rig. Beautiful spot with a small stream under the line.

H1G5yID.name: Southwoods line
H1G5yID.description: This line is small but there is scope for a 20m midline, but if your in Yeovil the Hollow is better.. NOT RECOMMENDED TO RIG, too low. If you mainline failed you are likely to hit the ground.

OOzYPY8.name: Flat Earth 1
OOzYPY8.description: The first rig on this picture is a bit low but can be made 3m higher

Zizf-qV.name: Big Fish
Zizf-qV.description: Before rigg the midline you must ask for permission. There is a phone numer on the shed's doors. WARNING: The owners of area speak only in Polish. The best idea it's ask for someone who live close to this area in Slackline Kraków group on Facebook

ogRpa6K.name: Happy Days
ogRpa6K.description: Underneath the bridge, need plenty of protection. Need to belay down on far anchor

4W7eRj0.name: Conto dos Pescadores
4W7eRj0.description: Beautiful midline above the sea and near Pão de Açucar.

sQGdtdh.name: Capivara's Line
sQGdtdh.description: Midline very good to learn because there is the possibility of using the other pillars of the bridge decreasing or increasing the distance.

FU-jWqR.name: Runner
FU-jWqR.description: Two trees one on steep hill side so be careful when rain has occurred within three days prior to rig (use your best judgment) easily done with tag line two 16ft spansets to go around one tree and two 10’s worked fine for static

uzej2y2.name: La Tortuguita
uzej2y2.description: We suggest tell to Lifeguards who are watchting the beach that you are going to try the midline. 2 bolts each side and 1 hold #8 more for MMS next to these bolts

2Xqo3TT.description: Water-midline with beautiful surroundings and near climbing spot. IT IS NOT ALLOWED TO SWIM IN THE LAKE. Height of the line changes with water level.

1gYN-kU.name: Erotic line
1gYN-kU.description: Beautiful midline over the sea in an amazing cove

y8x3hjT.name: Lomepal spot
y8x3hjT.description: Meilleur spot de slick de Gironde, possibilité de faire la tricks line

arzBVYj.name: san juanazo
arzBVYj.description: línea relativamente sencilla de poner con acceso a los dos anclajes caminando desde el estacionamiento (20.038719, -98.661897)  el tagline se puede pasar caminando

cuh9g9f.name: BZ slack
cuh9g9f.description: contact use on FB for real data

45JzrUV.name: Sielecka Sielanka
45JzrUV.description: Popular park in the city center. Nice place for quick session.

Lynr3jE.description: Beautiful line under the bridge that straddles the river

L2mwf1V.name: wściekłe pięści węża
L2mwf1V.description: Łatwa dostępność miejsca. można podjeżdzać śmiało pod sam wyciąg i tam parkować

hn4htUV.restriction: partial: Highline spot on the “Forest ofTHEN” property. Entrance fee required. For more information, visit @forest_of_then on Instagram.

EN_wwIV.name: Serenity
EN_wwIV.description:
I sea kayaked the gear in & solo rigged this,  definitely would recommend bringing a friend.    Setup static anchor first by landing on the flat rock & climbing the cliff up to anchor area. Static gets rigged off big birch Backup to nearby tree. 

 Then paddle the webbing across the gap (or bring potato cannon & run a tagline to the north side.  Land & crawl through the cave to the northern point,  then scramble up the cliff  to get to a ginormous pine tree, that's your tension anchor.

P3pnCff.description: Big tree on river bank to the bridge

F61JZJt.name: Bloodflow
F61JZJt.description: Climbing sector Rebro, Blagaj. You have a 20min walk from the parking lot for the Stjepan fortress

23Dfrqs.name: Dalt Quarry
23Dfrqs.description: Rigged fairly high on decent trees over the quarry. First line rigged here.

BH9jrfW.name: La casa de las iguanas
BH9jrfW.description: Its a midline inside the city in one of the most famous lagoons in Tabasco

4BiVicz.name: Chauzon
4BiVicz.description:
Chauzon is a nice place to setup différent lenght.
But highline in Ardèche is a bit complicated so we try to be respectfull of other nature's users and environment. Therefor we can't put bolts everywhere (it's often forbiden because many places like here are in aera protected)

Also, in front of the spot there is a private beach with tons of tourists in summer.
The best option in high season is to come here only for the evening or the morning.

e7SQW9a.name: Pata Jambito
e7SQW9a.description: Natural anchors, 6m of spansets each side

eBYelbm.name: Baby-on Babylon
eBYelbm.description: Bottom of the hollow, easy to rig but not worth the effort.. NOT RECOMMENDED TO RIG, too low. Likely to hit the ground if mainline failed.

HvSUH51.name: La Perma
HvSUH51.description: Esta cinta es buena parte del año un permarig.

ifBKEiX.name: "George of the Jungle" line
ifBKEiX.description: Just uphill of the "Hungover Wall" on Keller's peak is this nice little line.  It's not too high, but it's got a great view.  It got it's name from a no-fall zone on the tensioning side.  If you fall there, watch out for that tree!

Hyusza4.name: BZ Slack
Hyusza4.description: contact use on FB for real data

Zat6XWr.name: Reef or Break
Zat6XWr.description: Beautiful cove with lots of options for different length lines over the pristine water. Sheltered from the wind most days. Great place to snorkel, climb, cliff jump, and slack all in the same day!

XXdo-2U.description: Natural anchors, need Lots of spannsets and crashpods of padding

T7RzSIP.name: The angel of the A92
T7RzSIP.description: A nice line through the forest, however some road noise.

72H1_Yf.name: Project
72H1_Yf.description: A lot of mountains all around, beautiful place to put a midline.

4eUWYVG.name: Leaping trout
4eUWYVG.description: EPIC MIDLINE!! Goes over the most intense part of the falls. Excellent swimming hole, virtually no approach!

cb5lLlD.description: Training midline spot. Third floor, ~10 meters height. Easy to rig and to get on the slack.

9uWer_C.name: El Tejocote
9uWer_C.description: Midline localizado dentro del Parque ecológico Montetik

C5NnSXe.name: Restauracja na końcu wszechświata
C5NnSXe.description: Beautiful area for walkig alongside the river, canoeing, jogging and even highlining! The best choice is to rigg it on a working day beacuse there is a lot of people on weekends.

c_bvM4r.name: Sapiegine
c_bvM4r.description: Nice midline spot with mostly spacious surroundings. Suitable for freestyle rigs.

_SiJBXz.name: IL FORCONE DEL DIAVOLO
_SiJBXz.description: IN ONE SIDE YOU NEED TO HUG A ROCK AT LIST 8m SLINGS YOU CAN BACK UP IN SEVERAL OLD SPIT, IN THE OTHER SITE 2 SLINGS FOR ANCOR WITH A TREE. IN BOTH SITE THE ANCOR ARE BHEIND AND ABOVE THE CLIMBING WAY

S9E9imU.name: Mamá unos manguitos
S9E9imU.description: Midline around 65 meters over the water, if you rig it loose and/or stretchy, you can touch the water in the mid of the line after a leashfall. The height of the anchors its around 8 meters.

wRVsEE2.name: Culo del santo
wRVsEE2.description: So cool place also to do slackline in San Miguel Alto.

06BDgpA.name: One love
06BDgpA.restriction: none: Un fin de semana sin problemas más de tres días no recomiendo

WShHBK-.name: Más allá de la felicidad
WShHBK-.description: Linea con bungees casi siempre está de perma

JPSVXrM.name: KŁOS
JPSVXrM.description: One tree closer to the road with a 2m sling and another tree with a 2.5m sling

bhoIltL.name: La Escuelita
bhoIltL.description: First midline of Gran Canaria... Nobody try this line for 2 years or more... necessary checking in both sides

LZ4TkVQ.name: Bigger Fish
LZ4TkVQ.description: Before rigg the midline you must ask for permission. There is a phone numer on the shed's doors. WARNING: The owners of area speak only in Polish. The best idea it's ask for someone who live close to this area in Slackline Kraków group on Facebook

nHtdaiP.description: A super beautiful line above a little creek. Fixed on top of a granite boulder block with 3 bolts on one side (make an extension of about 2-3 meters with your slings to really leave the block- the hangers are left on the block) and an electricity pillar on the other side. A second 60m line can be rigged from the same boulder bloc to the road. You simply need 1m-slings to fix the line on the road. Unfortunately the first 20m are too low to be walked.

6p09Z36.description: Easy rig highlines in a forest, there are mulitiple lines to rig here and we have permission to go here from Stadt Zurich

XwJ1TPH.name: Sugar Snap
XwJ1TPH.description: The original Pittsburgh midline, a fantastic learning ground for both highlining as well as rigging.

kp355y2.name: Jamapa
kp355y2.description: Dos buenos arboles para anclajes naturales. Se puede llegar caminando por cualquiera de los dos lados

Iob1y4T.name: Christchurch Slackline and the Crazy Czeck
Iob1y4T.description: Total Midline. Bolted by Fer Kpok. 1st Send Fer Kpok

o0QgO1G.name: Entre o Sol e a Lua

nc1jIX2.name: Homespot nr 1
nc1jIX2.description: Defenetly a Midline, use at least a 3 times segementet Line. Have a Knife ready for emergency.

w5Ru_rL.description: Bolted both ends with hangers installed. Walk down to the beach from up on the cliffs, line is south from access track. Small amount of easy rock climbing to get to both anchors. Can take a rope to rap down to make it easier

QY9Xr0R.name: Container full of dreams
QY9Xr0R.description: Lowest area in the quarry, just below 'We don't give a ship'

pdnbUbB.name: Fortino midline
pdnbUbB.description: An anchor is made on tower with rope or link sling .   Other one on the three

6NQB9_y.name: Unnamed
6NQB9_y.description: Beautiful midline over the sea in an amazing cove

4FZaCqs.name: “The Draw Bridge”
4FZaCqs.description: Beautiful 80 meter over looking the Wenatchee river

GO5a-iF.name: kalte Füße
GO5a-iF.description: easy to rig, tree to tree. Easy access to the line from the right side.

hkjYO3h.name: Crappy Rock
hkjYO3h.description: Highline. Midline. Bolted by Petr Polak, Numa Besteiro and Fer Kpok. 1st Send Fer Kpok

Inq4QYj.name: Pipistrelli
Inq4QYj.description: in a forest, over a pit, you can't walk the hole length (because of the hight)

2uAD7V5.name: Rebirth
2uAD7V5.description: A nice line over a quarry, fairly easy rig and nearly 0 no fall zone

1EVVP29.description: There are a couple dirt jumps nearby, rarely used, but best to be aware of just in case

C1Vodrh.description: In the Boulder Area "Magic Wood", there are several possibilities of rigging midlines. This 77m midline goes from a massive tree to a concrete pillar of a road-gallery. The boulderers of the area enjoy it a lot when we are playing on our lines there.

N3a1xZc.name: Goose Line
N3a1xZc.description: Decent line with a lot of no fall zones. Not the best for walking, but better for beginners.

DDycUuf.name: Vallatscha2
DDycUuf.description: Tree on both sides. Easy access by trail

BCZcz7M.name: El anfiteatro
BCZcz7M.description: La tirada cruza el anfiteatro desde un ciprés (Lado A) a 2 o 3 puntos hasta una casuarina (Lado B)

lfm1MCK.name: Linha dos F(e/i)lipes
lfm1MCK.description:
Midline de 100m de distància por 9m de altura.
O acesso so e possivel atraves de ascensao em ambas as arvores

iZnoq_2.name: Barragem
iZnoq_2.description: Conquered by Vitor Luz (insta @vt_luz), and Gustavo Féo (insta @guufeo)

uGkkAjh.name: Tapé dans l'oeil
uGkkAjh.description: Quite long hike compared to the exposure, but it is a beautiful midline ! You may even have some people hiking stopping to talk :)

jiJ4Jcc.name: La Picapierda
jiJ4Jcc.description: Abandoned hospital I south of Madrid. Lines from 10 to 45 meter long. No longer cause of the high.

XC98_Pu.name: Yıldızların Altında
XC98_Pu.description: Beautiful line that looks towards the bay of Türkbükü, north anchor needs to be rebolted to use the height in a better way. South anchor could be rebolted as well. Line needs at least x2 fractioning points.

3bHfA-8.name: La Cabra Loca
3bHfA-8.description: A beautiful iconic midline in Monteverde area. The first midline/highline ever rigged in the area.

2ERkPjz.name: Cepi Green
2ERkPjz.description: Beautiful Highline/Midline first established and sent (fullman) by Nicolas Bahamonde on 18. June 2017

D2yLALn.description: Longest length possible at the location

S3G96N6.name: sweet deception
S3G96N6.description: roughly 35-40m. uses a large boulder for the static anchor, bring at least 30m rope and 6 draws to climb static side. for better acces info check out monkey town in the icecapades on mtn project.

fz4KiDG.description: 74m midline in granite. Bolted on both sides. Hangers on place. Easy rig. Only june - october as there is too much snow otherwise.

e-4eaq6.description: A super easy rig 110m midline bolted on stainless A4 bolts. 3 bolts per side. Hangers are left on site. Only in summer from June - October because there is too much snow the rest of the season!

VZp8byT.name: Paradise-Island
VZp8byT.description:
The perfect highline-island! But the island is only for rent e.g. for weddings, etc. So definitely restricted access - at least in high-season. But maybe it would even be worth to ask the owner if we could make some highline-shows on this island....

The line can be rigged about 15m above the sea between 2 trees. Super easy rig and such a nice place to chill ;-)

_qm6o1E.name: Midline Königswiesen
_qm6o1E.description:
West: single tree, but must be climbed to achieve equal level
east: form a triangular anchor from two trees

YRGuIwM.description: This is a good beginner midline with a rather large no-fall-zone on either side. The middle of this line is over the water and good for practicing mounts and whippers.

62ENhoh.description: Mid line, possibility of a water line if you lower the anchors. 10-13m high dependant on tide. At low tide its a mud pit, high tide up to 1.5m of water.

FXnh6oS.name: Ibergeregg 30
FXnh6oS.description: Midline i climbing area , for acces info check the 47m line. Video with this line: https://youtu.be/bAsjaqENvuc

OEQRlHf.name: Vallatscha1
OEQRlHf.description: Tree on both sides. Easy access by trail

fqM4Uuz.description: All lines in this cove must be rigged natural. The static anchor of this line shares the same boulder as the 80m line. A moderately sized spanset will suffice here. The tension side anchor is a large tree further back in the cove. A spanset is opt...

eRVayO8.name: Buena Linea
eRVayO8.description: Midline over a Flash Flood area.

nqpbWrA.name: Suburban midline
nqpbWrA.description: Beautiful little spot tucked away in the suburbs of brisbane. Shielded from the road but not from the footpath.

aD853mp.name: The Knights Of Hamdon
aD853mp.description: A more direct line across the gap, slightly shorter but easier to rig on the tree side..

5lAj6sA.description: Cozy spot right next to the bridge. Great for beginners as it's easy to slide out on the line, tie in and to inspect the anchor.

1vvRJQ9.description: Chill easy midline, great for freestyle, two other parallel lines next to it.
1vvRJQ9.restriction: none: Area at risk of destruction by mining company

XTCiR_X.name: Costco
XTCiR_X.description: Tree-to-tree midline, climb trees to anchors. Two super solid, very tall oak trees. Lots of good personal anchor points. Multiple paracord nets up in the tree at the tension side anchor.
XTCiR_X.restriction: none: Private property, pls contact tonyarr.905@gmail.com.

Tfx7o0e.name: Prehistoric Pool Party
Tfx7o0e.description: Easy access near the little foot bridge. Space for 4-5 Midlines over a small gorge. You are very visible right off the path, so be respectful of the area so we don't have access issues. Lines range from 15-20 meters on the short one up to about 60 meters further down. Rigging is easy, but be careful as the area is very eroded and its easy to slip.

IfTC3HE.name: Medellin
IfTC3HE.description: Ubicado en el peñon un highline muy escénico

-WyH-by.name: Fürwiggetalsperre
-WyH-by.description: Midline/Highline across a dam. Different lengths possible, longest would be around 80m. Not very very high, but awesome. 2m slings are perfect. Careful with the sandstone, it is very abrasive to your equipment. Most certainly not a legal highline, but we ran into no trouble so far.

e8pebuK.name: Crunchy Carrots
e8pebuK.description: Try to use heaps of tree pro, trees are really sappy and makes everything sticky. Anchor off of trees either side of scree gully. Use spansets and back up to trees behind. Walk in as for climbing area. Then continue in direction of fire track and ...

Q2X1QoC.name: Lulimania 175
Q2X1QoC.restriction: partial: Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch

VNkZReK.name: Haole on the Rocks
VNkZReK.description: Single u-bolts on each side. Sharp lava rock, bring padding!

9sTmj4b.name: World of trains
9sTmj4b.description: There two train bridges. You can rig lines from 22 m to 30 m length. Also you can rig three lines at one time.

wdbf4Ur.name: Hole 19
wdbf4Ur.description: Natural anchors. Rock wrapping. Bring long spansets and padding.

BTyk4iq.name: Shoe Loose Blues
BTyk4iq.description:
One Side open acces (direct street), other side on land of Moritzburg.
Line without Backup (to low), enough space for leash fall.
Be aware of the small river underneath, when slacking with loose clothes.

ukK5Mfv.name: Walliforline
ukK5Mfv.description:
You need to take protections and 3 slings of 2m (2 for the north) and one of 3m (for the south with the 2m). South : 2 point of 10mm (on the stairs) and a iron barrier 
North : 2 point of 10mm and one point of 12mm (just after a big iron barrier)

MEtR-eM.name: Casa Ecologica
MEtR-eM.description: La tirada es entre un ciprés (lado A) y un árbol que se divide en 3 (Lado B)

bE4IDJx.name: Sic transit gloria mundi
bE4IDJx.description: Tree midline, permanently rigged! (unless I am away for a long time or I need the gear for something else)

3Wz17IC.description: Two bolts with chain links on each side, half inch stainless bolts. Tension side on a clean patch of rock on the north side of the river, static side on the back side of the concrete bridge support. No falls zones about ten feet each side.

fBXFnil.name: BZ Slack

KW1XncS.name: Lagun

C-xlg5h.name: Žan Fu
C-xlg5h.description: Climbing sector Rebro, Blagaj. You have a 20min walk from the parking lot for the Stjepan fortress

RCH-p9c.name: Darner
RCH-p9c.description: Mid high waterline. Leashfalls don't reach water

X4bzZrN.name: Lepiej późno niż wcale
X4bzZrN.description: First midline in Bielsko-Biała, nice view but a lot of bushes, definitely you need to use a tagline.

CyNxVat.name: BZ Slack

bgnriQy.name: Waterfall
bgnriQy.description: 2 anchors to a tree, or better two trees,

CwYe7dL.name: Val Chamuera 2
CwYe7dL.description: Tree on both sides. Easy access by trails

uhb1ecr.name: Tom&Gerry
uhb1ecr.description:
Nice line under the trees, I leave there a lanyard to simplify the rigging hoping it has not been broken by the weather! Be very careful not to drop stones standing at the anchor 'cause it's a famous climbing spot and few people use a safety helmet!!!
Edit: at 06/2024, the tagline was still present.

_UCwCjk.description: Protect trees or your gear will be confiscated with $400 fine

5FtGtT5.name: Balkan beauty
5FtGtT5.description: bolted and first ascent in 2013 by Slovenians

pLUuKQe.restriction: partial: Highline spot on the “Forest ofTHEN” property. Entrance fee required. For more information, visit @forest_of_then on Instagram.

JkS7orN.description:
Midline over the water.

See info on the 57m line

Cy7umgm.name: Hmmm... Curious
Cy7umgm.description: Very curious location for a slackline..

znPoKlc.description: Protect trees or your gear will be confiscated with $400 fine

g7nYUVn.name: O Abraço
g7nYUVn.description: The average line, the hug, is approximately 175 m, cutting the bay of Vidigal entrance, having free access and frequented by fishermen. opened on 05/19/2019 by Nova Geração RJ

f57nPsD.description: Midline with a nice ledge to hang out on under the bridge

84-YjP7.name: Botanical Garden

w5IcQhA.description:
max long line 90-100m   
possible to built a Rodeo

wvSTwT9.name: Breath

znihidb.name: la rame
znihidb.description: good line in a peaceful place and the beach at 100m

sYrv2xe.name: Varniukų Highline
sYrv2xe.description: As it is a pedestrian bridge to a major park there's a lot of attention from passerby. Named Varniukų (Crow hatchlings) highline as there's a nest a few meters away from the tree used as anchor

Was rig for the first time for a show for the community done with Salomé Cholet among Nicolás Ospina and Paco Zubieta. The line is in the middle of the town. Is a good freestyle rig or for beginners practice.

r-5Az4q.description: Shortest line available at a safe height

ZjqYEZY.name: Käppeli Unicorne line
ZjqYEZY.restriction: partial: Please contact the owner for permisson. Rafa https://www.facebook.com/kappeli.ch/?locale=de_DE

BVJJXNS.description: The line is tidal and can be 4m off the water in high tides. Big docking bollards on either side

HCnQyGO.name: Seclusion
HCnQyGO.description: A nice midline that can be setup pretty fast and taken down. Great for day trips, or leaving the line up and coming back to it over the course of a few days. About 1/3 is a no fall zone, you'd whip into the ground or a bush.

s8Ot7pf.description: Small forest of Gum Trees located next to a dirt jump park. Many options for lines.

Hx2XOaW.name: Tendue de Cléchet
Hx2XOaW.description: Midline for beginners and for freestyle training

TyNwPN9.name: Coral Reefer

XFT5d0e.name: quarantine freedom

wVH1qgk.name: A short line above the lake

ajzQHcJ.name: Don Genaro
ajzQHcJ.description: Beautiful line with a great view on one side and forest on the other. The trees underneath are so tall that you can hit the branches when you fall.

DHKwfwD.description: 3 MMS far side,  Big natural anchor dynamic side

5-jeQyy.name: Chester mid/highline

vBsYdhv.description: The line is tidal and can be 4m off the water in high tides. Big docking bollards on either side

dsJiHOn.name: Plava lama
dsJiHOn.description: Midline above the waterlines. Free solo material.

NrL2BCT.name: Evergreen jungle midline on the mississippi
NrL2BCT.description: Spansets, plenty of trees to wrap

chcSX5v.name: Spacey Gracy
chcSX5v.description: Water-midline between Gracy Cove at Pace Bend Park. As of 2017, this is the best spot for highlining in Austin. Be aware $10-15 admission is required for entry into the park. The south anchor is in the middle of a campsite, so it's potentially a hassle to rig if another party is occupying the site before you.

20qUtER.description: The very first highline spot of Vilnius. Not really used by anyone at the moment. But tribute to the past is a must!

wa6KJLe.name: Perra del infierno

QRTVc-f.description: Contact Micah Carroll in "Slackchat: Michigan" Facebook for beta

vATwS5z.name: La Esperanza de los Calcetines
vATwS5z.description: Parking of the Roman Bridge. Coming from Roda de Isabena and La Puebla de Road it is in the left side going downhill. Then you walk down to the roman bridge.

lvOr1a7.name: Loco line
lvOr1a7.description: Easy rig highline in a forest, there are mulitiple lines to rig here and we have permission to go here from Stadt Zurich

rddOHU-.name: Scoiattolandia
rddOHU-.description: Super accessible woody midline, just 5min from Cima Sappada Church.

ejVBJMG.name: Val Chamuera 3
ejVBJMG.description: Tree on both sides. Easy access by trails

8Hw58rK.name: Albariño en Seiñas
8Hw58rK.description: Trees, it is needed to climb and setup some rapel

4y7d97B.name: Hollow Highline
4y7d97B.description:
Easily linked midline, no climbing required.. Almost all the tree's are bomber..
Has been called 'Hollow-man' but mostly called the 'Hollow Highline'
Half of this line is over ground on the west side, beware the double drop hidden platform  
on this side if you do walk off's.. Good beginners line..

kqRie4n.name: Check-a-Line
kqRie4n.description: This spot is tricky to get to. You have to park your car far away and walk about 20 minutes to get to this popular cave visited by deep water soloists. If you're bold, you can set this line up as a waterline. But then it's a 7-8m fall onto water if you slip. So it's better to rig it as a midline using a leash. You can use natural anchors as there are a bunch of rock formations around.

4on-fJr.name: La midline Cita
4on-fJr.description:
Repost des 2 lignes mais avec photos des ancrages, parce que c'est quand même le spot majeur de stras (et de schlag) ;)
D'autres longueurs seraient possibles mais pas assez de hauteur pour les rendre safe. Utiliser un backup cousu dans l'idéal, sinon laisser le moins de mou possible sur le backup.
Prévoir un ficellou ou une corde pour monter la ligne depuis le rempart d'en face, les accacias ont poussé depuis le printemps 2024... (on ne peut plus faire le tour)
4on-fJr.restriction: partial: seulement accessible le dimanche, ne pas installer les autres jours

B6LPvTD.name: Midline del planetario
B6LPvTD.description: Midline rigged in the pillars of this bridge, it's a good one for practice because it's not very exposed

-iMHLUZ.name: Reotier
-iMHLUZ.description: 4 points on each side, plus a backup point. Easy midline, on a climbing spot, really easy access, near the road

fgJ630R.name: La interestelar
fgJ630R.description:
La interestelar se abrió en Enero del 2025. La primera vez que se montó fue con ayuda e iniciativa de Daniel Garzón y Daniel Bernal, dos buenos amigos rolos que estuvieron de visita una temporada en Ibarra.  

Usamos cintas de poca elongación por que la altura no es tanta. con Sky diamond y una extención de poliester, el sag es lo mínimo posible y se mantiene un estandar alto de seguridad.

iB_xjGd.description: Small forest of Gum Trees located next to a dirt jump park. Many options for lines.

zfdLLzX.name: La llave oculta
zfdLLzX.description: Nice midline in Los Picachos area in Peña de Bernal.

Gwr1D8V.description: Small forest of Gum Trees located next to a dirt jump park. Many options for lines.

N0YyaKH.name: cate nuar cat blanch
N0YyaKH.description: One side is a nice tree the other is more a big busch, so bring tree slings and some statickrope to make an nice equalised ancor

qi-j2EG.name: Forest freestlye

Chill spot in the forest 
Parking close by
Over river
Sheltered from the wind

kksQrRA.name: hardturm water midline

B4kJy55.description: A nice, but off level mid/highline over a beautiful waterfall.

kakhLKG.name: Desire path

U8TKA0r.name: Chota Ladakh
U8TKA0r.restriction: full: I went to the spot on November 17, 2023, and there was a guard blocking access. After chatting with him, he told me that 4 people had died 2 years ago. As a result, no one was allowed to install a highline.

QzGio4O.description:
A tiny line at the top of the Hollow, easily rigged from tree's..

NOT RECOMMENDED TO RIG too low. If mainline fails you are likely to hit the ground.

DWs4Bb-.name: Scenikc
DWs4Bb-.description: Nestled in a banquet of trees with opportunities for lines nearing 200, this spot is a gem. While the surroundings may not be the prettiest due to the homeless population. This is a safe line that your gear is unlikely to be tampered with. Was perma-rigged for a period of time and saw no issues.

9bZHTTe.name: Fins que plogui
9bZHTTe.description: 10mm bolts, 2 on each side. From Col de Puymorens, following Vall d'En Garcia. Parking close to the spot but difficult road

yG5LyOo.name: Tiene Tutto
yG5LyOo.description: One tree per anchor, 35 cm diameter each one

xonT79Z.description:
The line is an about 60m, rigged off of 2 trees on each side of the gully. We used ropes to access each anchors as everything is chossy.
We drank the river Easter worth no problems and a great waterfall just behind to cool off

H5z_efz.name: In da game Line
H5z_efz.description:
Both ways trees 
In one anchors recomend  to use an aframe

Ig26btG.name: Mantra de salamandra
Ig26btG.description:
Next to a waterfall. Tagline usually there. When rainy access and rigging quit difficult because it’s a steep hang.

Edit: Due to a landslide, the original anchor nearby the waterfall is gone. There might be other Trees.

Jbgx1pb.name: FORSE NON ERANO 40M
Jbgx1pb.description: THERE IS THE SMALL ROPE ALREAY UP, REMEMBER TO LEAVE IT AGAIN.

ovdDFWa.name: La mamahuevo
ovdDFWa.description:
Esta cinta se monto por primera vez en el 2021 con Paul Cevallos que vino de visita unos días.  La distancia puede variar entre 79 y 82 mts, dependiendo de donde se ancle en el puente La altura es de 19 metros exactamente medidos desde el puente hasta la parte de abajo donde pasa el río Tahuando. 

Aquí también, se hizo la primera competencia de speedline simultaneo del País en el Encuentro decembrino de 2024. El primer lugar fue para Jesús Gonzales de Bogotá y el segundo para Cristian Castro, de la Mitad del mundo.

pzRIGb9.name: Zeus
pzRIGb9.description: Une ligne magnifique qui trône au dessus d'abysse...

sLKxYja.name: Engagement Line

A easy line installation and perfect spot for morning.

eku9Iyg.name: Warren Drugs
eku9Iyg.description: Nice little line, no no-fall zones in the middle. More complicated rigging than other lines in the area so setup much less often. Nearby this area of state forest on Gopher road drug traffickers would stop to move drugs from Chicago to the Twin cities. The sheriff happens to live on this road! So with the line being located in Warren, MN it only makes sense to call it Warren Drugs.

AZpNXlo.name: Fenton

Mod1iZ3.description: line spots from middle lines to 100m longline

TGQTWsV.name: Gaute da suta
TGQTWsV.description: tree anchors, there is a small cord to pass the line and a bridge to bring equipment to the other side. Not very high but enough to be safe and I don't know the real length but it seems around 40. There are several small branches touching the line.

_DZjSrJ.name: Adeline

je3VaP-.name: Pirmokas

8r39h8A.name: Freedom Park

g-MgIEP.description: С одной стороны деревья, с другой химические анкера(шпильки 12мм, две на основную линию, две на бэкап). Подъезд на машине, подъем на сопку 5 минут

Ie2d35s.name: Giants Bite
Ie2d35s.description:
WARNING - BOLTS OVERDUE FOR REPLACEMENT. RIG WITH CAUTION.

10mm hangars and bolts required. Abseil down south face to access bolts in wall (one of which is a reach round the nose of face). Rig ab rope round rock plate on top. Recommended rig with a rope backup, but must be static due to short falling distance. Must be rigged tight to avoid deck out in event of gear failure. 
Easy access to both sides of exposure, long haul up steep hill to the spot, flat ground for camping either side. Beware of loose rock and harsh weather conditions; the spot is an old quarry littered with boulders and loose rock, and is very open to the elements.
The spot is technically on private land, but due to high level of climbing activity in the area, no known problems have been raised by the landowners. Spot is used locally by dirtbike motorcross riders.

b0uv835.name: Sueco viejo
b0uv835.description: Parking of the Roman Bridge. Coming from Roda de Isabena and La Puebla de Road it is in the left side going downhill. Then you walk down to the roman bridge.

9TSbGq3.name: Russian River midline
9TSbGq3.description:
60ish meter midline you can leash fall without hitting the water. Great line for freestyle sessions that you can end but untying and jumping in. 
Recommend to use the the south anchor as the dynamic side even though you might not want to set up base camp on that side of the river.
We did a scorpion wrap around the tree and diverted around another to get the angle right. Dealers choice when you rig, there’s a few options.
Static side has to be this one tree tucked behind a little beach. It’s off a trail, pretty obvious. Use a bunch of spam sets or aid ladder to climb the tree. 
Watch out for people boating, rafting and swimming they have the right on way.

nMtSLS_.name: (EDRIS GANJI) #2 Slack Park Line – Steel Pole Anchored System (Afghanistan)
nMtSLS_.description:
This slackline was installed inside a slack park using an engineered anchoring system based on steel electrical utility poles.
The line was rigged following engineering safety principles, with a focus on redundancy, load distribution, and material compatibility.
Due to limited access to slackline-specific equipment, certified industrial safety gear was used.
All connections were secured with backup knots and secondary systems to minimize single-point failure.

FYkL0-a.name: (EDRIS GANJI) Slackline Park Line in Afghanistan#1

This is the first slackline installed in a slack park in Afghanistan.
The line was rigged and walked by(EDRIS GANJI) the first Afghan highliner .
All safety considerations were fully respected. Due to limited access to slackline-specific equipment, certified industrial safety gear was used.
All connections were backed up with additional knots and redundant systems to ensure a higher level of safety

Rigged Lewis and Laura with Dimitri and Kris from Hybrid Slacklines- Cheers for the spot guys! See you next time!

rz-5e8S.name: Save the last bay of Albania
rz-5e8S.description:
Its in the bay called "The last bay" in Ksamil, a city in the very south of beautiful Albania (with tons and tons of possibilities for water and highlines everywhere!!!!!)

All natural rig, no bolts needed 😍

On both sides massive boulders, but only 1,5m above sea level.
Left side boulder has a perfect hole where i girth hitched a 2m sling through it and made it my tension side.

On the right i took a 2,5m sling and girth hitch wrapped it around some edges at the top of the boulder for the static side.

Its very sharp rocks so make sure youre padding well where the slings are moving. 

I rigged a Unicorn webbing with a lot of tension so the sag in the middle wasnt goin too deep under water 😋

Really beautiful spot. Currently its off season so very little people around, mostly travellers/hippies from around the world. 

Potential for more shorter lines close by.

wepGpjZ.description: Short waterline easy to rig and walk, fun with tubular webbing

JQof_3N.description:
Nice natural anchor 60m waterline. With a low-stretch line you can keep it loose all the time with sag up to about 4m.

It's very windy location, so don't forget a set of wind dampeners!

The line is very high so if you are not sure you can easily walk it, I'd reccommend leaving a 5m "ledder" made of slings somewhere in 1/4 of the line. Otherwise you will have to slide on your butt to the safe starting spot several times... ;)

For more information about the area and the ascent check the 16m Rusty Bolt line description.

natural anchors ( big rocks) you need long slings to put around (4-6 meter) for each side.

RUb4_Eb.name: Another Albie waterline
RUb4_Eb.description: This line gets you further from the flow but needs to be tight to get out of the water. Best to rig when the river is running low. Be careful with how you tag it, last rig was almost a hazard trying to swim the webbing across in high flows... a tagline is a good idea! Also wetsuits will help you enjoy your time on the line but not essential. Also a good one to walk with a leash due to heigh above the water that is required.

7SA1d6E.name: Cliffs Waterline
7SA1d6E.description: In this beautiful area well known by locals as "The Cliffs" there is a great waterline area. The water is very deep year round so flipping off of the line is okay in this area. The current in the area is generally slow and is therefore easy to swim in and out of. In order to rig this line, have somebody swim across the gap with a tagline and pull over all gear necessary to rig around a 1 foot thick tree. Be careful on the other side of the river as snakes and spiders, although rare, have been spotted. Once the line is rigged have fun and enjoy!

1GhEK47.description: On one side a tree and the other side the rail of a bridge. It is in the middle of the city so easy to get there

dTScvm6.name: not sent yet
dTScvm6.description: Folks jump from the bridge on the left. It's fine if you're not on the line, but be careful. Trees

cPaeKXA.name: Bungee Jumping Babies

2Uj2rrH.name: Lakelse Canyon

mLZ2f09.description:
Tree 2-3m sling
6m sling connect under the bridge. fotos follow

ZZzqVYx.description: Longueur pas certaine. Besoin d'au moins 50m de ligne

JT_88vV.name: Summer vibes
JT_88vV.description: Plusieurs longueurs possibles sur blocs rocheux. A Frame de chaque côté pour les lignes supérieures à 20m

MMCMrCF.name: Waterlijn de Munt
MMCMrCF.description: Somewhat longer waterlines ( possibilities op to 100m)

ISksV8D.name: No sé
ISksV8D.description: Courte ligne rodéo sur plaquettes installées par inconnu. Tiges un peu rouillées, possibilités ancrages naturels. Rodeo.

K9kCXqA.name: Unnamed

eRhZr1E.name: slack and climb

aQ02NTl.description: Waterline, the place is full of waterlines, all with natural anchors

ltXkMNk.name: Tallebudgera Waterline

Watch out for the rocks on the shore.
We have been kicked out once, and the other time was fine, so not sure if is forbidden or not

4jmiwAE.name: digitha'line
4jmiwAE.description:
Élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide

3w9NI4y.name: Waterline Donau
3w9NI4y.description: Sehr guter Waterline Spot, da das Wasser direkt am Ufer tief ist. Gut zu Fuss erreichbar.

J7iQ6b3.name: no car, no problem
J7iQ6b3.description:
Natural anchors on both sides
on one side you have to back up the anchor, cause I'm not sure if the sling would slip while surfing or playing hard. By feet from unije town

nzlmoSX.name: Calypso
nzlmoSX.description: Un très longue waterligne ouverte par Lucas Milliard - on est à la limite de la midline !!!

N-wwRrK.description: płytko przy brzegach / shallow near shore of the lake

KtHHMCo.name: Water of Love
KtHHMCo.description: Rodéo courte mais splendide orientée ouest.

mlJLg0d.description: A good spot for high waterlines.  Lines are possible between all of the docking towers for the large Paddle boat that goes up and down the Columbia, as well as between the dock supports.

NhieIra.name: Lydford Weir

DVjVlj1.name: rodeo dei cavalli

6t8Wn9v.name: La Coqueta

klJCei_.name: under the bridge

Tp8-mwe.name: Idéfix
Tp8-mwe.description: Petite ligne protégée du vent. Possible de l'installer au sec.

jjaWORo.name: Hood River 100
jjaWORo.description: a nice waterline near the Hood River Event site

n1G8464.name: Lumb-Hole
n1G8464.description: Rodeoline over the pool. Potential for a second or third shorter, less saggy line but would require more effort to rig. Make sure you check the pool depth before rigging, and watch out for a couple of pointy raised blocks which are near to the lin...

3NLrh0C.description: Both anchors are large, strong cypress trees

j3pCYDX.name: Virginia
j3pCYDX.description: Standard rigging equipment and at least 65 meters of webbing. You have to climb on to the bay, rig one side from there, the other side you rig from the tree next to the sign on the road

gy8MENi.name: Swanick
gy8MENi.restriction: partial: Access to pontoons requires permission from Swanick Marina

bcntPN5.description: waterline easy to rig, possible as a midline as well.

po1N73g.name: Pitoplancton
po1N73g.description: Difficult access, having to walk for a couple of hours to the beach and afterwords walk on the rocks, climb and swim for an hour. It's only possible with calm tide.

Nh1HD6I.description: Natural Anchors on stone ledges. Use back-ups!!

cYggFvE.name: San vito line

_BF0xXd.description: Tree and pole in the water

K_BYoJg.description: deep enough to fall in the middle easily, extended over land on far side, recommend water shoes- slate very sharp

0OPhO_f.name: Lago Sirio
0OPhO_f.description: Tree anchors, the left side has to be reached swimming. There are several possibilities to rig between 60-90m.

uuUEWxv.name: Slack park éphémère 1
uuUEWxv.description: Uniquement pendant la période estivale lorsque le niveau d'eau est au plus bas.

zuFWPue.name: Close to Taxi
zuFWPue.description: Simple rigging,2x m spansets for anchors

pRpabzk.name: Freshline
pRpabzk.description: not too deep pool but clean and nice place for waterline.

ICBeqKF.description: A 30m line and 2x 3m slings should work fine at this spot, text me if you set up one, i'd love to join ;)

SW7r69f.description: Fun waterline for a hot day. Rig from the tree to the right of the rope swing tree to the one across the pond.

TdP-9rI.description: Line set up every year during the Transalp Waterline Tour.

tQFAZ2K.name: Frejo
tQFAZ2K.description: Plusieurs waterlines possibles de 10 à  50 m dans une eau bien fraîche. Du monde à partir de midi l'été.

QQ7taz9.name: BLAMcala
QQ7taz9.description: 3m sling on one side 2m on the other. Use the nobbles in the rock. Walk around the bay to link the line

4SPtloL.name: Hood River 200

1WCXQnV.description: Really nice spot for waterlines, from 25 to 140m lenght

TSImfmV.name: Balscadden waterline
TSImfmV.description: short waterline rigged with slings around rock outcrop

y70bDiS.name: Possible water line
y70bDiS.description: From the pillar on the dock, to a tree on the shore

AJ9NHxo.description: Easy access by climbing to the pylons from the bridge. After rain the water can get pretty gross with things washed into the creek.

ovJtN5u.name: One love
ovJtN5u.description: Línea sobre agua en julio o agosto se seca el Spot

ksLWY6q.name: Waterline Ancones
ksLWY6q.description: The rigging is quite easy. Take car of the level of the seabed, leash and harness  are a MUST

TZV6q6W.name: Like a sunday morning
TZV6q6W.description: En été à poser à l'aube ou en soirée car beaucoup de monde.

2BSBV99.name: Swimming Pool with trick and rodeo line possibilties

JbrJuef.name: La Banchina
JbrJuef.description: Spot is full of people and tourists during the summer because of the restaurant La Banchina, and its a nice place to swim, its well protected from the wind and is sunny (no shade from buildings) until sunset. some extra Description

Fy32HHm.name: Griotte Waterline
Fy32HHm.description: Across the deepest part of La Drôme near Die

5_P-pod.name: Afföllerwiesen
5_P-pod.description: Waterline in Afföllerwiesen. Best to access from the park side but will need to swim across or bike/walk the long way around (~1500m to get to the other side). There are two old concrete anchors from an old bridge with steel rods sicking out to use as anchors. Best to take some towels/padding to protect gear from rubbing on concrete and rusty steel. The anchor points are about 2.5m above the water so most rigging needs to be done within arms reach of anchors. So it is easiest with a linegrip or at least low stretch webbing. Water is ~3m deep.

LoYJ1ts.name: iLe de vodovator
LoYJ1ts.description:
This is a hard line to rig, only for advanced riggers. On the island is some bolted big rock but it is to low so you need to search some wood to build a A-frame. 
The tree on the is to thin so you need to back it up with some static rope, bring at least 50m. 
A very nice line, deep water, fresh water even in warmest summer!

DgMpoW3.description: Lot of waterlines everywhere and many naturals anchors. Check anchors before some rocks are fragile.

YItjxW-.name: Punta Negra
YItjxW-.description: Waterline, tends have small boats passing by or people doing canoeing but very enjoyable

cPpsvon.name: zwolseswag
cPpsvon.description: Climb on both sides in the tree with rope. The line can go acros the bridge

rNHtd7Z.name: Waterline La Ballena
rNHtd7Z.description: The spot use to be quite calm despite of the weather conditions.

TqyHIOp.name: pipemonster
TqyHIOp.description:
1 tree Sag at 2m at least
other maybe 1m max

pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

5xhBER-.description:
- Pole on one side
- Tree on the other (need at least a 3m sling)

xFuX4ji.description: This is a rodeoline in a heavily trafficked area. There are lots of kayakers and paddle boarders here.

cyU_Ria.description: waterline, easy access, easy rigging. You can use a basic slackline of 15m with ratchet

uHjztuv.description:
Very nice spot and protected from rough sea.
water depth: 2,5 meters

4XKJqn2.name: Sotto Torre Uluzzo
4XKJqn2.description: Slings around rocks. At least 6-7 meters long on the north-west side and 3 meters on the other

Ancrage possible sur le ponton (priorité absolue aux pécheurs), mais plus pratique sur le gros arbre à côté.
Tendez la ligne assez haut pour permettre aux embarcations de passer dessous, il y a un loueur de bateaux électriques en aval.

xiy7Bqp.name: El palmero
xiy7Bqp.description: 2 bolts in the small island and natural anchor in the other side. Might need harness woth lower tides

jjUbjsM.name: Cacciucco briao
jjUbjsM.description: Il primo ancoraggio si trova sulla sinistra delle scale per scendere alla spiaggia, l'altro si trova sullo scoglio più alto visibile, sul lato opposto

pcPgYy8.description: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la...

pMQZXl_.description: Only possible after summer when there are not so many people.

kQO-eMB.name: Rae's Creek Aqueduct
kQO-eMB.description: Tree to tree. Public park no access issues

RLP4wTk.name: Sector de Escalada do Ratão
RLP4wTk.description: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.

A slackline with a deep hole right underneath the line, awesome diving location, snorkeling and chillout spot.
The entire area of dwejra is made up of stunning rock formations.

oJbADAr.name: Mosier Swimming Hole
oJbADAr.description: A small waterline for a small swimming hole.

vAujpXh.name: Ligne du diable

Ligne éphémère après les pluies lorsque la cascade est présente.
Ligne passant sous la cascade et suivant le lit de la rivière.

0Rkf21s.name: La Clavicula
0Rkf21s.description: Be careful with low tide, there is no enoug water below to fall safe.

UW0RJU9.name: Kamp slapić
UW0RJU9.description: nice spot in camp... depth is good and ease of access.

A53tnmo.name: Plos 2
A53tnmo.description: Selon niveau d'eau janvier 26 au plus haut

vJ8kgde.name: Caraman line

ZnSSbD9.restriction: partial: Ne pas installer des deux côtés de la piscine sur la même session, de ce fait les passants ne pourraient pas rejoindre l'embarcadère.

jVMWhjS.description: easy to access, with deep waters but must be carefull in the first 2 meters and the last 2 meters cause there are rocks in the surface of the sea

i59jNxa.name: Akimbo
i59jNxa.description: Long waterline over fast flowing river

GO6v8sl.name: Hippieline

P6Sma1a.description: Rigged during vacations when the beach is crowdy.

zzV7FuT.name: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.
zzV7FuT.description: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.

VrhaseF.description: Water depth can vary but is typically between 5ft and 6ft. Trees

MEopNBw.name: Houghton Falls
MEopNBw.description: Waterline across the outlet of Houghton Falls

ElM6C4r.name: East Sands Harbour
ElM6C4r.description: Ask Harbour Board before for access. Both anchors are Mooring Posts on the Harbour

y7TFDBO.name: La Pata De la Vaca
y7TFDBO.description: Nice waterline with calm water in urban surroundings.

HFyvc9j.name: L'odyssé
HFyvc9j.description: Une ligne parallèle à Ulysse : un grand classic d'abysse !

bo_Zq6-.description: Il faut un peu grimpouiller pour aller mousquetonner la plaquette qui se situe sous la pille du pont

zON65--.name: Preciosa
zON65--.description: It can be a rodeo or a midline

qEZjODO.name: Contrabanderos Freesta

Natural anchors both  ways
