TjBF0v6.name: Into the Deep Sea
TjBF0v6.description: Simple rigging,2x m spansets for anchors

00wF0Fq.name: No send yet
00wF0Fq.description:
Waterline / rodeo / middle line of 70m, only accessible through 18km of canoe.
Bring your leash. The bottom of lake is not really deep on half of the line.

HYz5tbh.name: Trill Farm waterline 2
HYz5tbh.description: Using the right side tree's you rig to the island, this line is over more water and its deeper..

MWT9T7X.description: Natural anchors, slings around rocks, paded well

KQRfLVY.name: Areuse
KQRfLVY.description: Deux sangles pour partir des arbres

qb6zlTH.name: Quai Bellevue
qb6zlTH.description: Préférez la marée haute si vous ne voulez pas atterrir sur le sable

sHJxPNB.name: Island in the sun
sHJxPNB.description: A short waterline over the clutha by Albert town. Very nice on a sunny day but the water is cold... most fun with a wetsuit

dXsRlB7.name: Heart of sardinia
dXsRlB7.description: Natural anchors on both sides, different lengths and even midlines possible

KbxLCMF.name: Barrage Kaya
KbxLCMF.description:
Ligne en face du barrage de la base de canoë kayapuna.
Arbres de chaque côté.

wBV5e9P.name: Am Sprungfelsen
wBV5e9P.description: Easy and fast to rig waterline with access from both sides. Northern side is slightly overhanging and can be started from the shore.

T1X1SJo.description: Small tree on one side. High anchors advised!

f6XoJXC.name: Im falling!!
f6XoJXC.description: Nice 40m waterline over the river. It's quite a hard line as the river is flowing underneath (feels like you are constantly falling). Popular swimming spot. water is quite deep (people jump from the curved bridge).

WPgKgle.description:
Other possibilitis for longer lines
http://waterlinedatabase.blogspot.com/. Natural anchors on both sides. make sure you have good padding if you not wanna ruin your spannset. the rocks are pretty sharp

4UjHp5p.name: Fetcher Waterline
4UjHp5p.description: Tree anchors on both sides. On the peninsula side use the large cottonwood furthest from the parking lot. On the other side use the cottonwood behind the bench in the clearing.

LouPyKB.name: "Big V"
LouPyKB.description: Gotta pick one!  Either the "Big V" or the "Little Z".  This is probably the biggest waterline possible at the Klickitat.  Just a meter away from the rock, the water is super deep and safe to fall, even if the anchors are a little high.

K7Nlbbp.description:
Élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide

uIwX5Os.name: Marina long
uIwX5Os.description: Un sitio precioso fácil de aparcar, chiringuito en la playa, duchas, palmeras para poner la hamaca y un pequeño puerto con bares y minimarkets a 5min andando

wAoI4nO.name: Agrykola
wAoI4nO.description: First rigged during the snow storm

NB7pIZd.description: Sometimes fishermen come and tell you that you have to leave and sometimes the just let you be there. Trees

XpWIBHX.name: Altenbergsteg Waterline
XpWIBHX.description: Hardcore Waterline for hardcore people. Be careful not to fall in the beginning. The water can be shallow and the line is quite high.

aRMF415.name: Big Wobbly Jellies
aRMF415.description: Short Waterline. Good fun, lovely view and awesome rocks. The area is very tidal, best 2 hours each side of high tide, unless you fancy a mid-line on trad gear. The area is a deep water solo venue at high tide, so extra climbing is possible and its deep.

9FDgUau.name: Kangaroo Point Waterline
9FDgUau.description: Sweet line and great view but rather unpleasant water. Beware of the bullsharks!

COB_wVY.description:
DON'T trust google maps when you just type "Jägersee", it'll try to send you along closed roads.
Closest official parking is in Feucht before the to bridges crossing the highway and the railroad.

Many options available, but also lots of thinner trees.

k_6lzHF.name: no hay piedad pa los godos

f0k3JeT.name: Tranquil tellisford
f0k3JeT.description: good fun little waterline, plenty of trees to rig other lines, just need to make sure they are stable/strong wih not too many branches in the way!

qSk9TSi.name: Rodeoline Charco Azul
qSk9TSi.description:
Rodeo-Waterline

Visited Nov ‘25 with very poor water quality, not something you want to fall into!

9gITdLq.name: Waterline Corvara - Lago Biotopo
9gITdLq.description: Little waterline over the biotop lake of Corvara. Ask the lifeguard for more info.

zGHaRNN.name: Little Swan
zGHaRNN.description: An idle and secluded waterline spot with a fine place for a campfire to warm up

h8chVs9.name: Joining
h8chVs9.description:
Located at the Joining restaurant. Not-so-great natural anchors, bring protection. Line is 3-4m above water so you cant climb back up after you fall. Be careful when the tide is low.
Some short boulder problems on the rocks surrounding the line.

OGnSFt2.name: Little mermaid
OGnSFt2.description: Nice waterline, mounting is safe ~3 m from the anchors.

TYttVHO.name: El pantanu mola nanu
TYttVHO.description: Waterline over the lake. There are many possibilities.

B4htUH_.name: Waterline 30
B4htUH_.description: This is a classic waterline in Bern
B4htUH_.restriction: partial: Slackattack has the official city permission for this line, it needs to be anchored in a specific way, please contact slackattack if you go.

B8lrb6o.name: Project
B8lrb6o.description: Lovely waterline with easy rigging. Safe bay with natural anchors. Water is clear and deep (2,5-4 meters deep)

uc3LODM.description: świetna miejscówka na długie waterliney, mało ludzi, dobra opcja na spacelinea

l87Pt8I.name: Mouchette
l87Pt8I.description:
fun waterline.
Attention à la mouche noire

D6V0n-A.description:
This line is sometimes set up by the people Schloss Loshausen for kids with a line to hold on.
One side is a public park, the other side is private, but I am sure there is no problem if you ask. 
The river is not very deep and easy to access.

0pfLPZ6.description: Tidal pool on the atlantic seaboard with potential for a few different waterlines

IY7t8AM.name: Charco Azul
IY7t8AM.description:
Short waterline

Visited Nov ‘25 with very poor water quality, not something you want to fall into!

nSHgy4o.name: El Fructuoso cave lines
nSHgy4o.description: In El Fructuoso cave you can set several waterline lines using the stalagmites and stalactites for anchors...
nSHgy4o.restriction: none: Take care with the nature, this is a protected natural zone.

JwZ6OCA.name: Ulysse
JwZ6OCA.description:
Ligne majeur du spot.
31m de long 
il faudra traverser à la nage pour installer ;-)

4_SXAG1.name: Waterline Torbole
4_SXAG1.description: You can only slack in the afternoon or in the early morning, because this is the entry to the harbour.

IOSkFuE.description: Fun waterline for a hot day. Rig from the ropeswing tree to the one across the pond.

V0--Ewj.description:
DON'T trust google maps when you just type "Jägersee", it'll try to send you along closed roads.
Closest official parking is in Feucht before the to bridges crossing the highway and the railroad.

Many options available, but also lots of thinner trees.

tOo7Dxc.name: Caleb
tOo7Dxc.description: With low water there are cracks for cams. Very high water and trees can be utilized

S_DM1hy.description: You can vary the length infinitely here

eHnsMz6.name: Ochensbach Waterline
eHnsMz6.description:
A really nice place for a Waterline in the summer. Please do not drive your car to the lake. Only stupid people do this. There is a parking space near Neustadt. 
Also take care of the nature. Don't trash don't camp or make fires.

ULLDtGO.description: Beware that on one side the draft is not enough,  so you can use safely something like 3/4 of the length.

l13NHP-.description:
Élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide

TG1tajh.name: Upper class dirtbag
TG1tajh.description: A beautiful rodeo waterline but relatively not so easy to rig and not 100% walkable - natural anchors on sharp rock and requires a bit of climbing on both sides. Only 3/4 of the line can be walked (The other part have rocks below it) and the line can be walked only during high tide as  the surrounding water are pretty shallow - make sure that there are no Sea urchins below the line!

UenjKPb.description: waterline, easy access, easy rigging. The place is full of waterlines with natural anchors. You can rig from 12 to 50m or more.

gjTgAX3.description:
Waterline de 31m, les ancrages sont assez bas, donc prendre une slack pas trop elastique.
Attention aux 2 rochers dans l'eau près de l'ancrage rive droite qui peuvent poser problème selon le niveau de l'eau. Préférable de commencer depuis la rive gauche, bien plus profonde.

aKTm0f1.description: Respect du site car Situer en Zone Natura 2000 . Une élingue de  3 mètre autour d'un rocher  de votre coter et en face une spit avec une fix (sur le quel on se raccroche avec un mousquetons ). Route du pont st Nicolas , en partant du pont se garé ...

IF3-eMw.description: Couple options (none of them amazing) for rigging over a very nice swimming hole. I rigged it with 50m of blue off of one very large tree up the bank on the near side and a smaller but still solid tree on the far side. Had to swim a tagline across.

2XslBRN.description: Waterlines over Salford Quays. BEWARE OF SHARP METAL NEAR EDGES!!

vEgPsUg.description: Tree on one side is about 6 feet around.  On the other side there is a chock stone stuck in a crack about 30 feet from the water

8VZLz0P.name: Unnamed
8VZLz0P.description: Beautiful waterline over the sea in an amazing cove

qM9TSH7.name: Cascade blanche
qM9TSH7.description: Ancrages sur arbres, départ sur galets puis 15m au dessus de l'eau face à la cascade

uyI_WbN.name: The Precipice
uyI_WbN.description: The Precipice sits in a beautiful canyon, just above Palouse Falls. The line spans a large pool of water hidden from the view of the tourists above. This line was established in mid-September of 2021, during low flow conditions when the water was moving quite slowly towards the lip of the waterfall. Considering the proximity to the lip of a 200 foot water fall, make sure that you consider how fast the water is moving! At low flows, there is very little danger posed by the waterfall.

_30v5ed.name: Wind of Change
_30v5ed.description: Awesome sundowner-line - can be rigged quite high, about 4 meter above the water

dx-SSJk.name: walk into the woods
dx-SSJk.description:
1 tree Sag at 2m at least
other maybe 1m max

pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

_8L-YDD.description: Watermidline, easy access, and good DWS spot. Put a leash because the anchor points are 8m high. Or you can rig it super loose so its close to the water

FPmmeMY.name: Linda
FPmmeMY.description: There is no bridge. You need to swim. And the river is not very deep - 2 meters max.

OsadBP4.name: Opera house water line
OsadBP4.description: Good anchors on both sides, made for boats. Good idea with extra straps and potentially some extra padding

onyWl10.name: Cote d'azur
onyWl10.description: Very nice open space. Yet not sent. We rigged this line in extreme wind conditions but will be back soon :)

Y0sP9gC.name: Silikatnoe
Y0sP9gC.description: There is no bridge. You need to swim.

ILw1VJq.name: Round Pond Waterline
ILw1VJq.description: This is a state park. There are no explicit rules against slacklining although I'm pretty sure slacklining may constitute as a dangerous activity which is at the discretion of the park rangers if you screw around/ screw up. Be careful and keep a l...

EqXJlfY.name: Cala de la Media Naranja
EqXJlfY.description:
The most beautiful waterline in Anadalucia (personal opinion). Pristine waters, not very deep, but deep enough.
There may also be possibilities for longer lines over deeper water, but the acces won't be super easy.
EqXJlfY.restriction: none: Watch out, sometimes people are going in the bay in motos boats - the can be to high or when your are rigging or derigging, their motors cut damage the line and break themselves.

6Mds5DB.name: Monstro do lago
6Mds5DB.description:
Boca do Igarapé recordação no Lago Verde, Alter do Chão/PA
Anc. A Escola da Floresta
Anc. B Pierre

lTZ_xum.name: Vervet waterline
lTZ_xum.description: Project, attempted late May 2025 by a brave Frenchman. Still awaiting crossing in one go. The line is very public, facing several restaurants and about 100 apartments.
lTZ_xum.restriction: partial: Access to the western anchor goes through a fence, that has a really big hole in it. So, we are probably not "ment to go there". But nobody has complained this far.

na0qQaO.description: Nice long waterline above deep, cold water.  Nice high anchors let you get your sag on.

AxHIGAE.description: Big post and tree on one end. Fat post on the other. easy to rig

Xsn2FJE.name: Trill Farm waterline 1
Xsn2FJE.description: Using the left side tree's you rig to the island, water is just below waist deep so you can walk the line across..

sjbNvFL.name: Cherwell
sjbNvFL.description: Rig a bit higher so that punts can still go underneath. Trees on both sides, however, the tree on the boathouse side is quite big, maybe use a 4m sling. Access from the East shore (via Aston's Eyot, which is accessible from Jackdaw Lane). Access f...

0odeVst.name: Piscine de la mer 1
0odeVst.description: Possibilités de poser plusieurs lignes sur la largeur, en diagonale ou sur la longueur.

C2kT5m-.name: Everything Undone weir- shallow!
C2kT5m-.description: Parking is on ferry lane, just off the A36. Parking is VERY limited so travel in as fewer vehicles as possible. Easily accessed by the canal/cycle path. Walk over the train track, bridge and footpath sty, then right down the field to the weir

Em7zD2-.name: Plos
Em7zD2-.description: Selon le remplissage du lac, 1m à 1m50 sous la ligne

ewCUUdS.name: Sheng Luk High stream Sai Wan

lEm5asP.description:
ligne très sympa mais il faut se méfier de la marée slackable autour de la marée haute uniquement
la distance est très approximative

LJWVjGs.name: maidens cove waterline
LJWVjGs.description: Tidal pool on the atlantic seaboard with potential for a few different waterlines

Yoon6QR.name: Aster's Cold Feet
Yoon6QR.description: This is a great little waterline that a group of us established on our hike to Pear Lake. This line is slightly difficult due to the high movement of the water. The reason that I'm posting this on here is because it's a nice line you can rig while also enjoying many beautiful views along the way. Since the length of the line is only 90 feet a primitive kit is more than enough. Trust me, you don't want to take more than a primitive kit on a long hike such as this one.

hFaSlDD.name: Kokkinis line
hFaSlDD.description: Its not that good, but if you stay in the hotel next to it, it gets the job done

_5_L5Ty.name: Unknown -
_5_L5Ty.description: From the Pole to an old Pier construction

Mfh3vot.description: Funny waterline over the icy water of a beautiful lake. Pleasant way to combine it with a highline or alpine routes.

KcM4CW9.name: Wertachbrücke Wellenburger Allee
KcM4CW9.description: West anchor is a tree, east anchor is a pillar on the bridge

2yUgDzV.name: Ambolo
2yUgDzV.description: Are natural anchors, you need 3,5m of sling in each side. It's in beach "Cala Ambolo"

fwdeaoX.name: Little Consolation
fwdeaoX.description: A lot of fun in the sun, and makes a good beginner line. It's impossible to keep the line out of the water but it provides a challenge and is a bit more exciting than the other options around.

x_HUdmY.name: Star system
x_HUdmY.description:
waterline with "no fall down allowed at the end "
2 bolt rigging in each size, but near the sea it gonna be old !

O3E_Md6.name: Rusty Bolt
O3E_Md6.description: Nice little waterline for beginners and all those who don't mind the lack of sag in the line.

uZgfbcd.description: i prefer to go slacklining on the morning because of the crowd on the afternoon

t0eBQM5.name: Pier 60
t0eBQM5.description: Be mindful that it is a public beach and there might be kids around and there are lifeguards that are within eye site. I used 2 inch flat rope around the pillars of the pier

3uVx5jH.description: Deep water underneath, more less clean.

9ym0vQX.name: Roberto Warriors
9ym0vQX.description: This is a waterline located in Roberto Barrios Waterfalls the middle of the jungle at 45 minute from Palenque, Chiapas.

ywOFS1K.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!

GuZ3Mke.name: Currumbin Waterline
GuZ3Mke.description: Fun line in a lovely water hole :)

bSPNnGE.description: Beware of rowers. It is their training ground and you should let them pass by. A minimum rigging height of 3 m is recommended.

Q6XaRVS.description: Nice 30-40m waterline, far away from any road.

_4HlQjW.name: Le port du Bono
_4HlQjW.description: Slack facile à poser entre 2 bites d’amarrage, uniquement à marée haute (sinon il s'agit d'une vaseline et non plus d'une waterline). accessible le soir seulement en raison de l'activité portuaire en journée

UlnfBzi.name: El pantanu sempre mola nanu
UlnfBzi.description: People in the bar were really kind. Planty of possibilities depending on the water level.

8YlnxFr.description:
Swimming is forbidden but i put my lines every summer, no problem =)
Possibility to rig another lines with the same start place : 70m, 90m until 150/200m !. Trees

w_D8gxP.name: Thermaline
w_D8gxP.description: Waterline near the open access, warm up in the great public thermal fountain (up to 41°C?), and become a member of the club bagno popolare to support public access to thermal water

_IYKmbD.name: Malcesine
_IYKmbD.description: To built this line you have to climb a medium difficult boulder over the wather on the south side of the bay .

4gy2Zhj.name: La petite des Palabres
4gy2Zhj.description: Petite ligne en diagonale, sur la 3ème piscine en partant du parking de la librairie.

5kV1yyZ.name: Waterlines Hagenwörthstraße
5kV1yyZ.description: A couple of lines can be rigged here.

tU3V-wY.name: Reedends
tU3V-wY.description: Beautiful waterline at scenic park with many water birds in the middle of the city. Easy to rig. Since both shores get deep very vast it is more safe to walk most of the distance unlike other line spot here.

wrHZKIN.name: Pyramides de Vidy
wrHZKIN.description: An a-frame is stored at the nearby hangar, 2.5m high pillar is on the rocks  near the anchor, key is required, contact lausanne slackline WhatsUp group or Facebook.

Aaws470.name: Poseidon
Aaws470.description: Line between two rocks close to a popular cliff dive spot

rChVlpk.name: Long Load Weir
rChVlpk.description:
Waterline rigged off the weir, either at water level from the wooden posts or
from the weir to the higher posts..

ep61HQ1.name: Swanpool Stacks
ep61HQ1.description: High tide spot as there's some shallow reef at lower tide, sharp rocks too but a great line

ouNVm4s.name: Coco
ouNVm4s.description: En plus de cette endroit ,il y en a partout autour.....possible de faire toute sorte de slackline

xBUbZnx.name: Waterline at Menzer-Werft-Platz, Geesthacht / Elbe
xBUbZnx.description: The slackline can be attached to the pier.

3uoDN_r.name: Laguinho
3uoDN_r.description:
you have contact with club Piratini.

address
Av. Transversal, 645 - Orvisa, Charqueadas - RS, 96745-000

RpQ6BLX.name: Multi lines du lac
RpQ6BLX.description: Spot entre 30m et 100m possible, au calme (loin des plagistes) mais vite à l'ombre en fin de journée.

hdaG6AX.name: Kokina Vraxia
hdaG6AX.description: The place is called red rocks because of the red color of them ( kokkina vraxia).

3v7w3NP.name: Savska boldrca
3v7w3NP.description: Beautiful riverline between two glacier boulders.

mzFQd-Q.description:
Swimming is forbidden but i put my lines every summer, no problem =)
Possibility to rig another lines with the same start place : 70m, 90m until 150/200m !. Trees

WaI9TtF.name: Squaw Creek Waterline
WaI9TtF.description: Beautiful waterline spot over a calm creek. Have built up far side for nice seating and hammock spots. Very easy set up. Make sure to park by the volleyball courts and walk the gravel road back. Property owner doesn't mind but respect the land and don't drive over it.

_9bYO5B.name: Carnon Plage
_9bYO5B.description: One A frame needed on the beach side

PRisAF9.name: Bains des Pâquis
PRisAF9.description: a nice water line for people that like an audience

NeLqwbv.name: Beginner Line
NeLqwbv.description: A short waterline, not too high up, that is perfect for getting used to the change in mindset that Waterlines require.

R0WQ0Ov.name: Cita pallars
R0WQ0Ov.description: Waterline sag depends of water level

_dXGjeL.name: Volimo Hrvatsku
_dXGjeL.description: A very nice and quiet place with deep crystal clear water, a sea mattress is recommended to make rigging and approaching the anchors easier

5RUE2Yb.description: Very nice line, with deep clean water

kBqDB4l.name: Anse de Ster-Ouen
kBqDB4l.description: Difficult to fix the line and must take care of the tide. But really interesting and beautiful

FnZci-W.name: Bird Poo Rock
FnZci-W.description: The line is at Meelup Beach - From the carpark look right and you can clearly see the rock. You can rig a shorter line here but the one shown in the picture is the best one. It has natural anchors which you can use a span set around. You can only walk around 2/3 of the line as it's over shallow water and rocks but if you are confident then you can walk the whole thing. Bring some short rope to hang as a wind dampener and also as a way to climb back onto the line so you don't have to climb on the rock every time you fall off.

DW1ZFta.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!

5pOwKf2.name: Mont Chateau
5pOwKf2.description:
Please respect the land. Take out all trash. Respect the authority of the folks working at the West Virginia Economic Survey. Do not park in neighborhoods or restaurants. 

This is a great place to rig a waterline. Note, am able to touch anywhere under the line, but the water comes up to my chin in places (I am 5 foot 10 inches). This has never been an issue for me if you rig the line low enough, the water should break your fall. Use this link to check the water level of the lake:

https://waterdata.usgs.gov/monitoring-location/USGS-03071590/#dataTypeId=continuous-62614-0&period=P30D&showMedian=true&showFieldMeasurements=true

It is recommended to only rig when water levels are around or greater than 869ft. This cove is a common place to hang out and drink, so watch out from broken glass. Take a bag and carry out some trash and have fun noodling.

0xcnpvK.name: Cascada 4 encantos
0xcnpvK.description:
Ubicación no precisa (se necesita una guía desde termales)
Lugar hermoso en la jungla
Mucha profundidad en el agua (mas de 3 metros)

fyhJEZK.name: Cormoline
fyhJEZK.description: Ligne éphémère quand le niveau d'eau est au plus haut.

zHyIsd7.name: Humble Pie
zHyIsd7.description: This beautiful line lies along the Snake River, in the bottom of a vast basalt canyon. The water, craggy surroundings and shrub trees are reminiscent of a Mediterranean landscape. There is also a small climbing area within a stones throw. The line is 75 meters long and 2.5 meters above the water. First rigged on 7/15/20. Still awaiting clean walk!

ELEGESg.name: Mane Bogad
ELEGESg.description: Étang tout en longueur avec un sentier tout autour et des arbres juste derrière en guise de points de fixation, plusieurs longueur possible de 30 à 50m environ. Attention au passage au dessus de la berge, 1m50 de fond au milieu, beaucoup de vase!

Xfd403a.name: Coco's birthday
Xfd403a.description: Petite ligne sympathique. Pas facile à marée montante.

udPjAUs.name: Hawea Waterline
udPjAUs.description: A short waterline bolted between the old bridge supports. The bolts may be chopped as they are a tripping hazard for swimmers.

ERAD1FD.name: Tamarit
ERAD1FD.description: All natural, got a photonfrom the tension side, bthe statick one has a lot of options. We used a hole in the rock. Use tons of protection, the rock is very sharp

t3ZMiHb.name: El Juncal
t3ZMiHb.description: On the left side natural anchor (3m sling & imagination) on another side 2 bolts

L3x5mEn.name: Megalodon
L3x5mEn.description: Holds for MMS on each side

G_POrCo.name: 4i20
G_POrCo.description: Linha de Jesus, andar sobre a agua

x8JG-U9.description: 1 spit de chaque coter avec une platine

2bF9tAZ.name: Waterline Humaita , Descoberto por Edney Junior e Lucas Rest. By: Edney Junior

i7cHVrT.description: very beautiful but you'll have to walk waist deep cause the anchors are too low for the length. Maybe higher and shorter options on the west side of this one but they will need creative rigging.

aP-EsnU.name: Pont Medieval de Llierca
aP-EsnU.description: Dos chapas en el lado derecho, una chapa mal apretada y un parabolt sin chapa en el lado izquierdo (si vuelvo meteré chapas nuevas)

GNGrwkk.name: ile de sein
GNGrwkk.description:
from 20m (from the dock to the breakwater) to 60m between the 2 breakwaters. 
might be difficult to install due to boat traffic and park!

rN3ARqV.name: Consensual Send
rN3ARqV.description: Water level here varies by about 2-3 ft throughout the year. Late in the summer the water is only chest deep near the tension side (still plenty deep in middle and static side). Just don't pencil dive!! Have fun! . 2 bolts per side, quick links ar...

Bb11qQ1.description: We use the base of a single tree for the tensioning side anchor and equalize off three smaller trees for the static anchor

rmf6Z-a.name: Sans faire d'histoire
rmf6Z-a.description:
pretty obvious rig. girth hitch on the tree which has the electrical box underneath (you can use it for access). tension on the other side, on the first one of the taller pillars of the jetty.

installation assez évidente. tête d'alouette sur l'arbre qui a la boîte électrique à son pied (qu'on peut utiliser pour accéder aux branches si besoin). tendre de l'autre côté, sur le premier des plus hauts piliers de la jetée.

JI5UbYS.name: Big falls line
JI5UbYS.description: I wouldn't recommend using our tensions side anchor. I'm pretty sure it shifted during tensioning but I decided to roll with it.an alternative anchor would be wrapping the whole Boulder if you have enough static rope or using the surrounding trees.

ZRWq9iH.name: Pond People
ZRWq9iH.description: A spring fed pond that stays colder than the surrounding river flows. A bit muddy, but about 8ft deep once you're about 5ft out from the shore. Keep an eye out for snapping turtles, we saw a huge guy floating around when we rolled up. Approach from lock 12 parking lot, and look for a faint trail off to the right when you hit the the small rock flow about 0.2 miles in, this will take you to the pond. Approaching from the south involves some very unpleasant bushwacking.

FU2fnMS.name: Naabbrücke Naapspitz
FU2fnMS.description: South anchor is an easy to climb tree, north anchor can be chosen at any length between 30-100m at the handrail of the bridge

jA5WAup.description: Fun and adventurous waterline! Totally safe considering deep water beneath most of the line.

thdyyxP.name: Back to the roots
thdyyxP.description:
Giola is a natural pool and a famous point to jump from 8m higher to the water.
This is because at high summer is to much people there.
I put the line at end of September ;)

8o1ZF7b.description: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la...

2qI8Tdg.description: waterline de 65m, possibilité plus. quelques ronces sur l'autre berge, les troncs d'arbres sont bien caché derrière les branches mais ça se fait bien

F5e3QML.description:
Natural anchors,one two 2m round slings 
Primitive sistem
Other lines possible

QiMclgp.description: Short sling for anchoring to the bridge.

BOTXE-e.name: Un pasito a la vez
BOTXE-e.description: Its a mid waterline, 80 m long, safe to walk only 50 m

G0RJko_.name: Balkanoid
G0RJko_.description: Sand on the shore, deep water 5m from the shore

WZ2eJ8Q.name: Santa Maria Caves Waterline
WZ2eJ8Q.description: This waterline is sitting on another fun diving spot, so if you don't mind unfriendly rocks pocking at your feet the line is yours to rig.

7PE490s.name: Pappelgrun
7PE490s.description:
pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

6vKOeWD.name: Eierbal
6vKOeWD.description:
A waterline spot over canal near Garmerwolde, Groningen
it is just next to bridge so you can easly cross ans set up without getting wet. One tree is next to one house, please ring the bell and ask nicely for permission. The family is nice,  they are going to let you set up

wAo_DKu.name: Rope Swing Waterline
wAo_DKu.description: Normally rigged from a car's tow hitch, redirected over the barrier and to the tree. This does stop people using the rope swing so only come here when it's quiet. You'll need to lift the line for paddleboarders and kayakers.

8WDLPCW.name: LSP Waterline
8WDLPCW.description: Variety of trees for rigging waterlines across Horsetooth. Bring towels and try to be considerate of boaters

9MiJ5gV.name: Golddiggings waterlines.
9MiJ5gV.description: Bolted waterlines in old quarry.  Popular for swimming/jumping in summer.  Check depths near the prow. Cold water

DDopccD.name: Tulava Jurnjava
DDopccD.description: Beatiful landscape, biodiversity at its finest. Please clean after yourself 🙏
